Bill pulled in 9% of the traditional Republican vote in New Hampshire, and if just a third of those folks stay home or vote for someone else in November, we’d be handing our country over to Joe Biden, Mike Bloomberg, or worse, Bernie Sanders. But we have a chance to show folks that there is another path for our party and our country. Folks don’t have to hold their nose and choose between voting for a corrupt president or a tax-raising Democrat. There is another option, **and that option is Bill.** But if more folks are going to see Bill as a viable option we need to act fast. Super Tuesday is right around the corner, and if we can build on the momentum we’ve got coming out of New Hampshire, we have a shot of knocking Trump’s re-election campaign out for good. **Endorsed by: Republican Whip Steve Scalise** ✅

Peter,

The path to _**TAKING BACK THE HOUSE**_ goes through South Florida and the only way through South Florida is by _**DEFEATING**_ Donna Shalala in November.

Republican Whip Steve Scalise recognizes this and that’s exactly why he’s chosen to _**ENDORSE**_ my run for Congress!

**Here’s exactly what Congressman Scalise said about my campaign:**

_“I am sure that when it comes to serving the constituents of her district and fighting socialism, she’ll never be silent. In short,**Maria is a fighter**. She will be the powerful voice her community needs, and I am proud to support her campaign,”_

Plain and simple, Steve Scalise is a fighter and I’m honored to have his endorsement. His words of support carry special weight as we prepare for November. **[Stand with Steve and endorse my campaign TODAY!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=84b20b848d9742b380fe29176be1b498&_e=Cz7BklFzePDTTTIrSYXjuIctOibX6l0xABbJR6LP7udvO8e84HAue518TIDgg9a7gHjZGH4LOyyqTH0E6uFitpEfgvayvFpOnwupFscwUwV8aBE6EXbA0aNxVCC3gqVTocScB7qZtVLNtHQscpJ7Yj-XoSzfkiM5c9GA1hRCBTLBtzuwdN4A1I5qpr1YTBpdJse9g9UlOSLEb2V_I_hCM01ZkUEuVnntCncYv17dOwGp6ZhVmZ2XRVBR7reFPfe8-uHS_W1yfqaZu0xa7KxBrmsIcOnyySiMvbD0ePEYWZ7AXTkZbkQcJKmsv4W0v898pDBXB5aT12R0Mgx5zqwTa8fMdqdf7gkVJ_Wuns5cGkgk-1-q0wCqCANvEDxD_evgeg7KW5R5y630Nl2tWhjPKnaFV993kAqc3CwusDL4JMEMCaz1t_jnGR8qoYXGv-ds)**

Defeat Donna Shalala in November! ✅

Take the fight to Congress against Nancy Pelosi’s socialist agenda! ✅

Fight **EVERY MINUTE** of every day for my home and the people of South Florida! ✅
|

|

Maria Elvira Salazar

| | Hey, I won't take up much of your time. I was just looking over our numbers and realized something wild. **If every person receiving this email right now pitched in $2, we would raise $1,000,000. That would be an absolute game-changer for this entire campaign.[ Could you help us make that possible by donating $2?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390329/55b66746/22e6f12b/80fe2a7/3567517478/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-13-twofer&recurring=1&amount=2")** [Donate $2](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390329/55b66746/22e6f12b/80fe2a7/3567517478/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-13-twofer&recurring=1&amount=2") To put it in perspective, last quarter (3 whole months) we raised $2.4 million, TOTAL. If we all join together, this could change everything. It'd mean more resources to ensure we can GOTV for local caucuses this month. It'd mean we could put ads on TV to ensure Massachusetts voters know exactly what Joe stands for. It means we can invest in Facebook ads to promote Joe's message, record and vision. **Will you join the rest of the folks receiving this email in donating to our campaign - helping us accomplish all these things and more? [Pitch in $2 now to absolutely change this race. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390329/55b66746/22e6f12b/80fe2a7/3567517478/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-13-twofer&recurring=1&amount=2")** Let's show the true power of our campaign! \- Tiffani _Tiffani Sykhammountry

name: BREAKING-NEWS@PetersforMichigan.com
subject: The DeVos family is pumping $800,000 into a super PAC targeting Gary Peters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Betsy DeVos' family is spending NEARLY ONE MILLION dollars to defeat Gary Peters.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da804/5721a3ed/70a97223/efb0eef/3822010580/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
BREAKING NEWS, friend: **We just learned******Betsy DeVos' family is dumping **_**NEARLY ONE MILLIO** N _dollars to defeat Gary Peters.**

They know it's the best way to buy Michigan's Senate seat and guarantee Mitch McConnell will call the shots in Washington for another two years.

**Gary doesn 't have the backing of far-right billionaires like the DeVos family, but he does have something more powerful: you, friend.** **[Will you make an immediate contribution of $3 of more right now to defend Michigan's Democratic Senate Seat?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da804/5721a3ed/70a97223/efb0eee/3822010580/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGszMTUtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk315-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the ONLY way Democrats can flip the Senate is by winning in Michigan. **But t****his DeVos spending could tip the scales in this race - and right now, the polls are showing Gary TIED.**

**Senate control hangs in the balance here in Michigan. ****That's why we've set a rapid response goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight, but right now, we're falling WAY short of what we need to win.**

**In a race this close - with Senate control on the line - every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing. Gary's counting on your immediate contribution to win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats.**

Now she is running for the U.S. Senate to be a voice of reason in Washington. Paid for by Barbara Bollier for U.S. Senate

name: Mary Ellen Smith, Team Hick
subject: We just got word that Donald Trump, the Republican National Committee, and Cory Gardner filed paperwork so they can fundraise together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Real quick, folks -- We just got word that Donald Trump, the Republican National Committee, and our opponent, Cory Gardner, filed paperwork so they can fundraise together to try to keep Republicans in the Senate majority -- _right before Trump plans to visit our state!_ Washington Republicans are seeing the same polls we're seeing. They know Gardner is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in 2020, and they're worried about losing their grip on power. So, they've got big plans to swoop in and buy this election out from under us. Gardner is relying on billionaires to bankroll his campaign and special interests to push him across the finish line. name: Tina Smith
subject: While I'm putting up a tough fight in Washington, I'll need your help making sure we can win re-election back home in Minnesota.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200213-about?refcode=em200213-about&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

The best part of my job is getting to hear from the people of Minnesota about their stories, goals, and concerns for the future of our state and our country.

Listening helps me understand what people are dealing with every day so I can solve problems. I'll work with anyone, even if we disagree, to help all Minnesotans have the opportunity to live the lives that they want -- with dignity and respect. That's what I work for every day.

In Washington, I'm fighting for the issues Minnesotans are focused on: protecting and expanding affordable health care, supporting working and middle-class families, defending reproductive freedom, and so much more.

I'm working hard for Minnesotans in the Senate. But while I'm putting up a tough fight in Washington, I need your help making sure we can win back home.

**So, I'm asking you to step up as we reach the halfway point of our first (and arguably, most critical) FEC deadline of the year. Donate $10 or more and let's show them what we've got -- and that we're going to win re-election.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200213-about?refcode=em200213-about&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

This race will not be easy, folks. Special interest groups want to kick me out of office so they can flip Minnesota red and maintain their stranglehold on the Senate majority.

With so much at stake, everyone from the press to the pundits to Donald Trump himself will be watching our race very closely, and we need to prove we're able to fight back.

Thanks for all that you do to support our campaign.

-- Tina

name: Dean Browning
subject: My Republican Primary Challengers
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
As I am sure you already know, the Republican primary for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District is heating up.
Here is who I am up against:
* Lisa Scheller, a "Never-Trumper" and pro-abortion RINO, who was afraid even to mention the President in her announcement speech.

* Matt Connolly, who has raised less than $5,000 to run (against Susan Wild's millions) and is carpetbagging into the PA-7th after losing twice in another district.

I embrace a competitive primary, but neither of these two can defeat liberal Susan Wild.
Fellow Patriot, I need your support today to ensure that the best candidate to defeat Rep. Susan Wild is elected in the primary.
Will you help me win this fight by donating $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017HDIu2Z7SZoXX66KAXXJ9vcPqN2BU1_NPhKPFjIYJc3azyFGhAv5Zme0swxwd-bidWTwkVgbbIRWpdFO2jtVGyZR3K0TyFodK-SjWCu6nCH_DGUNwyoF3_Bz20kOPAI3OuWejoG5P9jxDv4N6MwgGhTX3Q-v7YqVAdPNfiZ56WGCRvVHhJRKFA==&c=VVmFYVzRGtjejty4c6d3i6egqpEZ_aD4lltwShVxe7mIfNeUnWtFMw==&ch=1loTliPj5X8Y-wfSMnDrrZi9d17cho441DmqXHkMKxP1yQMVJzp-7w==)
---
| In 2016 Matt Connolly lost by 8 points in a district President Trump won by 10 points - an 18-point swing! That's a red flag!
Just as bad, Connolly has already been exposed for failing to pay property taxes and having two federal liens on his properties.
How is he going to be able to stand up against a well-funded incumbent like Rep. Susan Wild? Lisa Scheller, on the other hand, is the epitome of the Establishment and is a Never-Trumper who donated the maximum to John Kasich in the primary against President Trump.
Scheller believes her path to victory includes running away from President Trump.
We aren't going to defeat socialist Susan Wild by running a liberal Republican like Scheller. My strategy, on the other hand, is to support Conservative values even in the face of opposition and to be rock solid in my support for our President Donald J. Trump.
The Lehigh Valley needs a candidate who will clearly state what they believe and what they want to accomplish and who will fight tirelessly for those goals and not waver under political pressure.
I am running for Congress in the Pennsylvania 7th Congressional District to be an ally of President Trump as he fights to Make and Keep America Great. But I cannot do it without your support. I urge you, after hearing more about my fellow Republican challengers, to chip into my campaign.
A donation will go a long way in showing I am the right candidate for the job, and that I am the only candidate who can defeat Rep. Susan Wild in 2020.
Please consider donating $50, $25, or even just $10 today to help my campaign.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017HDIu2Z7SZoXX66KAXXJ9vcPqN2BU1_NPhKPFjIYJc3azyFGhAv5Zme0swxwd-bidWTwkVgbbIRWpdFO2jtVGyZR3K0TyFodK-SjWCu6nCH_DGUNwyoF3_Bz20kOPAI3OuWejoG5P9jxDv4N6MwgGhTX3Q-v7YqVAdPNfiZ56WGCRvVHhJRKFA==&c=VVmFYVzRGtjejty4c6d3i6egqpEZ_aD4lltwShVxe7mIfNeUnWtFMw==&ch=1loTliPj5X8Y-wfSMnDrrZi9d17cho441DmqXHkMKxP1yQMVJzp-7w==)
---
| Fellow Patriot, with your support, I genuinely believe we can win the primary and turn Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District RED!
I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ Have you heard about my Republican Challengers? One of them is a Never-Trumper, and the other can barely withstand the attacks over the federal liens on his properties!
Please consider donating to my campaign today so we can ensure an electable candidate is chosen in the primary!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017HDIu2Z7SZoXX66KAXXJ9vcPqN2BU1_NPhKPFjIYJc3azyFGhAv5Zme0swxwd-bidWTwkVgbbIRWpdFO2jtVGyZR3K0TyFodK-SjWCu6nCH_DGUNwyoF3_Bz20kOPAI3OuWejoG5P9jxDv4N6MwgGhTX3Q-v7YqVAdPNfiZ56WGCRvVHhJRKFA==&c=VVmFYVzRGtjejty4c6d3i6egqpEZ_aD4lltwShVxe7mIfNeUnWtFMw==&ch=1loTliPj5X8Y-wfSMnDrrZi9d17cho441DmqXHkMKxP1yQMVJzp-7w==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017HDIu2Z7SZoXX66KAXXJ9vcPqN2BU1_NPhKPFjIYJc3azyFGhAv5ZivZNQn3zxThTfv0O9pk-CTr6BVqNV_LoybMv1GcvQBMAhidXpfp1eTv53xWjFtoWrlmMZxfBJ8P29q6jRrc0MZmGhpRIsdJ-wTDOdE10VpSZtqMO-KqTkA=&c=VVmFYVzRGtjejty4c6d3i6egqpEZ_aD4lltwShVxe7mIfNeUnWtFMw==&ch=1loTliPj5X8Y-wfSMnDrrZi9d17cho441DmqXHkMKxP1yQMVJzp-7w==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017HDIu2Z7SZoXX66KAXXJ9vcPqN2BU1_NPhKPFjIYJc3azyFGhAv5Zu0rj1CoOz6-goIHpMLOOylmhPFfIiROA4htmWe4Rw1YOPRFAX2tPuClgu7ZVO758xIi-c_kWw1yg-namRQLZmb3DkLgqtsXYJgVWX14TBeS&c=VVmFYVzRGtjejty4c6d3i6egqpEZ_aD4lltwShVxe7mIfNeUnWtFMw==&ch=1loTliPj5X8Y-wfSMnDrrZi9d17cho441DmqXHkMKxP1yQMVJzp-7w==)

name: Tina Ramirez
subject: Say NO to The "Squad" 🙅🏻‍♀️🙅🏻‍♀️🙅🏻‍♀️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjkdutl-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | Friend, **Let me be clear about one thing** : Equal rights, equal protection under the U.S. Constitution, _already exist_. _W_ _omen already have equal rights, and we don’t need a constitutional amendment to get them_. So, when it comes to the "Equal Rights" Amendment, I am an absolute “NO."
---
👇🏼 I Promise To Fight Against _THIS_ In Congress 👇🏼
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjkdutl-udthdyhkil-d/)
As usual, Abigail Spanberger is _**absolutely wrong**_ on this issue and _I look forward to this debate_._I am a pro-life single mother and a businesswoman, it’s going to be tough for Abigail Spanberger to distract from this policy with the usual Liberal name calling_. With me, she’s going to actually have to debate this policy and defend this terrible amendment. **We _ALL_ know she can’t do that**. _I Promise To Fight Against This In Congress_. [_**Just Like You, I'm Exhausted With “Squad Politics.” And Just Like You, I'm Worried About The Direction Our Country Is Headed Because Of Socialists Like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez And The Squad.**_](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjkdutl-udthdyhkil-h/) [**If Abigail Spanberger wants to stand with AOC and the rest of the Socialist Squad, pretending to know what’s best for our country,_have at it_. **](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhjkdutl-udthdyhkil-k/) You and I understand that our district needs new leadership -- leadership based on solutions not hate. _As your voice in Washington, you can count on me to be a leader who will work to __grow our economy, create jobs, stand up for the Second Amendment, and make America great again_ — but I need your support to win this campaign and elect new conservative leadership. __**Can I Count You On My Team Today?**__ Sincerely, Tina Ramirez
Conservative Candidate for Congress
VA-07

So, when it comes to the "Equal Rights" Amendment, I am an absolute “NO." 👇🏼 I Promise To Fight Against THIS In Congress 👇🏼 As usual, Abigail Spanberger is absolutely wrong on this issue and I look forward to this debate.I am a pro-life single mother and a businesswoman, it’s going to be tough for Abigail Spanberger to distract from this policy with the usual Liberal name calling. With me, she’s going to actually have to debate this policy and defend this terrible amendment. We ALL know she can’t do that. I Promise To Fight Against This In Congress. You and I understand that our district needs new leadership -- leadership based on solutions not hate. As your voice in Washington, you can count on me to be a leader who will work to grow our economy, create jobs, stand up for the Second Amendment, and make America great again — but I need your support to win this campaign and elect new conservative leadership. Can I Count You On My Team Today?__ Sincerely, Tina Ramirez Conservative Candidate for Congress VA-07 | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | |

I won't be receiving any valentines from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on you, friend, to help me reach my online grassroots fundraising goal before the end of the month.

_Every dollar counts as we continue to serve voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests._

And with just under $12,000 to raise before the end of this month and just weeks to go before the primary, we _cannot_ miss this goal.

name: Margaret Good
subject: Nice to meet you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14996407/157831833/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTllNzkyZi0zYTRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEVD3tjDrg3CrN_Fdb7OLRFu4PXlM4puroR3Sb5pXxw=&emci=1a809597-a14e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=699e792f-3a4f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) _You’re getting this email because you’re interested in electing leaders who will listen to people, work hard, and do the right thing; even when it means working with those you don’t always agree with._ _Margaret Good is running for Congress because she knows we must end the partisan politics that hurt working families and do what’s right for a change. Margaret will bring the same work ethic and common sense leadership to Congress that has guided her as a non-profit leader, attorney, and legislator in order to make government work for Florida’s 16th district._ _Margaret is counting on supporters like you to help her keep up the fight and flip Florida’s 16th blue. But, if you’re not interested in joining our effort, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/1a809597-a14e-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/699e792f-3a4f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTllNzkyZi0zYTRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aEVD3tjDrg3CrN_Fdb7OLRFu4PXlM4puroR3Sb5pXxw=&id=113801977&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) at any time._
* * *

Friend, **My name is Margaret Good and I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 16th district.** At a time when divisive and hostile rhetoric is flooding our political discourse, it’s more important than ever to rise above the partisan bickering and tackle real issues that impact real Americans. Growing up as the daughter of an Episcopal priest and a nurse, I learned from a young age the importance of helping those around us and lending a hand when our neighbors are struggling. It’s why I made a career out of public service. And when a seat in the Florida Legislature opened up last year, I knew it was an opportunity to make a real difference in our community.

What happened next was incredible: We united thousands of people across Southwest Florida and built a coalition strong enough to win a special election in a deep-red district.**Now, it’s time to come together again, put aside our differences, and fight for our common goals and for the common good. We’re going to do this, but not without you. I need you to join me.** For more than a decade, Congressman Buchanan has neglected Southwest Florida values and pushed our priorities aside to cater to the interests of Washington insiders. As our challenges have grown deeper and more complex, he continues to turn a blind eye to constituents and their needs by taking the easy way out. I’m running because the people of Florida’s 16th District deserve more than partisanship and political games. I’m running because we need to support our veterans, protect our environment, provide quality education to our young people, and make sure that people don’t go broke getting the healthcare they need.**I’ll never stop fighting for our collective future -- and that means reaching across the aisle and finding solutions that cross the partisan divide.** **Congress can do so much more with our resources, and we deserve so much better than our current representative. That’s why I’m running, and why I’m so glad to have you with us in this fight.** Thanks for joining our team, \-- Margaret Good
---

name: Charles Booker
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The official Senate campaign arm of the Democratic Party (aka the DSCC) just endorsed our primary opponent.
#
We just got some bad news.
The official Senate campaign arm of the Democratic Party (aka the DSCC) just endorsed our primary opponent. Before Kentuckians were even able to cast a _single_ ballot, DC insiders picked who _they_ think should be the nominee.
**Party bosses shouldn’t pick and choose our nominees.** Voters should. That’s what primaries are for! If you agree, we need your help urgently:
[**Can you rush a $5 contribution to our campaign to help us fight back against the party bosses who want to meddle in this election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14996474/157832152/2120468242?refcode=em20200214&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWM3OTg1Zi0zYTRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJt7DWx5D349PZ5tR9pRxanSkOzMihtjKu8R1O_nqeA=)
**[Rush a $5 contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14996475/157832153/2120468242?refcode=em20200214&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWM3OTg1Zi0zYTRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJt7DWx5D349PZ5tR9pRxanSkOzMihtjKu8R1O_nqeA=)**
I’ll be blunt. The DSCC and the party bosses believe that the way to beat Mitch is by running to the soft center. That’s why they endorsed my opponent. But we’ve tried it their way for years, and we’ve lost time and time again.
I believe that the only way to defeat Mitch McConnell is to run against Mitch McConnell. Dancing around him isn’t going to get us anywhere. We have to take the fight to him. You don’t beat the most unpopular senator in America by running away from him or trying to be like him. You win by putting him on defense and making sure he has to answer for what he’s done to us.
[**I need your help right now to fight back against this primary meddling — can you make a $5 contribution? clean_body: The official Senate campaign arm of the Democratic Party (aka the DSCC) just endorsed our primary opponent. We just got some bad news. The official Senate campaign arm of the Democratic Party (aka the DSCC) just endorsed our primary opponent. Before Kentuckians were even able to cast a single ballot, DC insiders picked who they think should be the nominee. Party bosses shouldn’t pick and choose our nominees. Voters should. That’s what primaries are for! If you agree, we need your help urgently: = = I’ll be blunt. The DSCC and the party bosses believe that the way to beat Mitch is by running to the soft center. That’s why they endorsed my opponent. But we’ve tried it their way for years, and we’ve lost time and time again. I believe that the only way to defeat Mitch McConnell is to run against Mitch McConnell. Dancing around him isn’t going to get us anywhere. We have to take the fight to him. You don’t beat the most unpopular senator in America by running away from him or trying to be like him. You win by putting him on defense and making sure he has to answer for what he’s done to us. = Having your support at this moment truly means the world to me. Thanks for being in this. Charles Booker = | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Preventing gun violence in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gk1DsnhVAR-UjaQ6WXKXFNP6oI8k1iUMlp1kENu70Y4=/czSgk1IMa9eEPv978otQyhbnHGfgIchOW9m-EnYI2zk=?refcode=021420)
| | Friend, Two years ago today the lives of hundreds of students at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida changed forever. Gun violence has plagued our country for decades and it is long past time for common-sense gun violence prevention to become the rule of law. Columbine, Sandy Hook, Pulse, Las Vegas, Parkland. Over and over again these horrific events have traumatized our country but little progress has been made to change course. Enough is enough - we cannot sit by and wait for another tragedy to happen. This year House DFLers are working to enact common-sense gun violence prevention legislation including criminal background checks on all gun sales and extreme risk protection orders. These measures were blocked in the Republican-controlled Senate last legislative session. We won't stop working until common-sense gun violence prevention is the law and our state is a safer place to live for everyone. Will you join us? Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gk1DsnhVAR-UjaQ6WXKXFNP6oI8k1iUMlp1kENu70Y4=/czSgk1IMa9eEPv978otQyhbnHGfgIchOW9m-EnYI2zk=?refcode=021420)

| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

clean_body: | | Friend, Two years ago today the lives of hundreds of students at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida changed forever. Gun violence has plagued our country for decades and it is long past time for common-sense gun violence prevention to become the rule of law. Columbine, Sandy Hook, Pulse, Las Vegas, Parkland. Over and over again these horrific events have traumatized our country but little progress has been made to change course. Enough is enough - we cannot sit by and wait for another tragedy to happen. This year House DFLers are working to enact common-sense gun violence prevention legislation including criminal background checks on all gun sales and extreme risk protection orders. These measures were blocked in the Republican-controlled Senate last legislative session. We won't stop working until common-sense gun violence prevention is the law and our state is a safer place to live for everyone. Will you join us? Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives | Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus. Dear Friend, I'm proud to announce that yesterday, the Austin Chronicle endorsed my candidacy for United States Congress. Key to the endorsement was that, according to the Chronicle, I'm "savvy about what it will take to defeat whoever survives the newly competitive GOP primary." This race is no longer akin to Don Quixote tilting at windmills. We have a legitimate chance to flip this seat. Many in the media ask me what I learned from my 2018 run and what I'm doing different this time around. I don't give anything away, but I will tell you that there are two plans in place starting March 5th (we get the 4th off!). One is for the general election, the other is a contingency if we face a run-off. Your response yesterday was phenomenal. But I'm asking you to dig deep and keep it up. clean_body: Peter, We just released a new campaign ad and we need your help! This is the last weekend before early voting starts and time is running out. Our campaign has the people power in this race — we have hundreds of active volunteers, thousands of individual donors, and more of our donors have come from inside our district than all of our opponents combined! But we need to get this video in front of every voter we can. = = We are expecting record turnout so we need to be prepared to reach as many voters as we possibly can. It’s hard to figure out exactly who will show up on Election Day. That is why it is so critical we can expand our universe and get our message to everyone we can. Be a part of our grassroots campaign! Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Merideth VanSant
subject: Come see me next week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Merideth VanSant for Congress
body:
Join fellow conservatives at our meet and greets.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jH5Vtuh1VFFo2jW0VTiXUWH3X4qPWyNcvdFdRB66oECz-o6gtXXDdGNT2ja91lqWSJ5W0mtlZvHI-SV68ZbgdmVpMrpC8T9VAUblB5-1YwoUbDjOXk32HIpVXGbC0wO5kasN5CrCW-nKakuztm_-6knbqYpHKDU1&c=yMVhBz9qinrDOKUHHwlTIID6TR3Fen0vxJcovKfMj8aB5CWi7VZ4sQ==&ch=HQiSnyIm_XDGasT9mEFCNe43NLKTkeAJ2dioeT2n549bnDBFVvN5Jw==)
---
| |
---
| Hello!
I never get tired of talking to voters! We'll be having two events next week and I would love to see you at one or both of them.
Come see us and talk about my priorities to create jobs, improve education, and most importantly work for the people of Oklahoma and America, not a political party! If we work together, there's no limit to what we can accomplish for our state and our country.
---
|
---
| Monday, February 17th 6:00 p.m. - 7:00 p.m.
Don's Alley 4601 SE 29th St Oklahoma City, OK 73115
---
| Our Don's Alley meet and greet will have a special discussion on how we can best support our veterans and military service members. I am very much looking forward to this discussion and hearing input from the military community.
On Wednesday, we'll be at Kamp's 1910 Cafe for a mid-week meet up!
---
| Wednesday, February 19th 6:00 p.m. - 7:00 p.m.
Kamp's 1910 Cafe 10 NE 10th St Oklahoma City, OK 73104
---
| I want to hear about the issues that matter to you and talk about our plans to take Oklahoma values all the way to DC.
[Reply to this email to RSVP.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jH5Vtuh1VFFo2jW0VTiXUWH3X4qPWyNcvdFdRB66oECz-o6gtXXDdGNT2ja91lqWSJ5W0mtlZvHI-SV68ZbgdmVpMrpC8T9VAUblB5-1YwoUbDjOXk32HIpVXGbC0wO5kasN5CrCW-nKakuztm_-6knbqYpHKDU1&c=yMVhBz9qinrDOKUHHwlTIID6TR3Fen0vxJcovKfMj8aB5CWi7VZ4sQ==&ch=HQiSnyIm_XDGasT9mEFCNe43NLKTkeAJ2dioeT2n549bnDBFVvN5Jw==) (Not required, but appreciated!)
I can't wait to meet you!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant
---
| | |
---
| ABOUT MERIDETH
---
|
---
| Merideth VanSant grew up here in Oklahoma City working at the family hardware store and lumberyard, where she learned the conservative values of hard work and community. A product of our Oklahoma public schools, Merideth was an award-winning business management consultant before starting her own successful business. A featured keynote speaker on business issues, former U.S. Delegate at the Global Entrepreneurship Summit, and co-founder of a social enterprising company that serves inner-city youth, Merideth has the commitment to community and business experience we need in Washington D.C.
She is 100% pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, pro-border security, and supports President Trump as our duly elected Commander in Chief.
---
| |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jH5Vtuh1VFFo2jW0VTiXUWH3X4qPWyNcvdFdRB66oECz-o6gtXXDdA0CH1lOJtpP1XNX7UX9kEW0OCFP53Hm3YGkKCE1P7dSotzLQELXLkP5lEvi4fG76WGiG755ZOwJmE068spy0G3s2Hn5dQZqlTdwym9Qf39rQrYx1vdJuuo=&c=yMVhBz9qinrDOKUHHwlTIID6TR3Fen0vxJcovKfMj8aB5CWi7VZ4sQ==&ch=HQiSnyIm_XDGasT9mEFCNe43NLKTkeAJ2dioeT2n549bnDBFVvN5Jw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jH5Vtuh1VFFo2jW0VTiXUWH3X4qPWyNcvdFdRB66oECz-o6gtXXDdA0CH1lOJtpPZBmww_aXo7cSR4kcWuebGb7ARee-j0XJcJzUHmab-fQ4H7r5yUlqm7SEHRsvSwUND_ZRq_-4KQyh3BiFbEItDr93eaLsHcHH&c=yMVhBz9qinrDOKUHHwlTIID6TR3Fen0vxJcovKfMj8aB5CWi7VZ4sQ==&ch=HQiSnyIm_XDGasT9mEFCNe43NLKTkeAJ2dioeT2n549bnDBFVvN5Jw==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jH5Vtuh1VFFo2jW0VTiXUWH3X4qPWyNcvdFdRB66oECz-o6gtXXDdA0CH1lOJtpPijJdidVMOVtL32xGC1GOpXdYPyszeebK4OLWgiTf_-f8AggC_R8Am-IX7o1DSLijBUy2sB5TjzbOYVTt1ILd6PrgIM2qRGl7CyL4VdX7nXA=&c=yMVhBz9qinrDOKUHHwlTIID6TR3Fen0vxJcovKfMj8aB5CWi7VZ4sQ==&ch=HQiSnyIm_XDGasT9mEFCNe43NLKTkeAJ2dioeT2n549bnDBFVvN5Jw==)

When you support the campaign this week, a group of top donors will MATCH your contribution dollar-for-dollar! This is a VERY important time to donate because the latest Alabama Daily News poll has Jeff Sessions ahead at 31 and Coach at 29. This is a toss-up race! Follow one of the links below to help. Let’s stand united as Alabama conservatives to DEFEAT Jeff Sessions and his establishment pals! Coach has asked me to send him an update tonight, and I want to add your name to the list of those stepping up to help. With just 18 days to go until the primary, I want to show him that YOU have his back in this fight to take on and defeat liberal anti-Trumper Doug Jones this November! So please, respond before 7:00 p.m. tonight. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: There's just one thing we need to get on the ballot in June
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/YGSHgNA4ELgx8aVy1FuhTM5xRiBHK2GfbxXB2-70FXk=)

Peter,

2020 may be a leap year, but our mid-month deadline is still coming up earlier than usual. That means we have even fewer days to hit our February fundraising goals -- **[and if we fall short now, we'll be feeling the effects right away.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/rGbodi2IICUrwYg-BhsL_xSa9ewOtGCBZcNIvjbM--w=)**

In just 11 days, we officially begin collecting signatures from registered voters in neighborhoods across our district -- from Flatbush to Brownsville to Sheepshead Bay. To get on the ballot for the June Primary, we must get a certain amount of petition signatures, and the more signatures we get, the more momentum we'll generate heading into the spring. **[But in order to collect signatures from voters, we'll need the resources to support a volunteer army -- and we'll need to raise it within the next 11 days.](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/rGbodi2IICUrwYg-BhsL_xSa9ewOtGCBZcNIvjbM--w=)**

******[HELP US GET ON THE BALLOT](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/rGbodi2IICUrwYg-BhsL_xSa9ewOtGCBZcNIvjbM--w=)******
We would not have made it this far without you, and we really need your support in this next crucial step before the primary. **[We've set a goal of raising $3,000 before our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight. Will you rush in a donation of $500, $250, or $100 before then to help us put together the strongest petitioning operation Brooklyn has ever seen?](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/rGbodi2IICUrwYg-BhsL_xSa9ewOtGCBZcNIvjbM--w=)**

Best,
Adem

******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/QugBGHNqTQ8lKb8uPPY63xnoRokxtJFscx8bW1mFtNY=/rGbodi2IICUrwYg-BhsL_xSa9ewOtGCBZcNIvjbM--w=)******

Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

name: Kay C. James
subject: You're Invited
body:
| | | [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NeYQYwIhunLAqnD3hIrHwmI7ZXb551GeNTk0aRtWAlOruChWeANEcKhb80-52Ji2pMApm7CHIka0u8DuFN-YlcNhHvDrhJtIUTWwY9ysmapJs6uBDMaiSvLQB0C2ZbYsShnQpfTD8AiRWTPFyNQ1Z0rJQTZKYAinEn1LrUT1MKcnxQElTdi50lyJ3hyqZ3RqV6IQMOlGIy_nKxTQIk0KUkMWsB8qfwu9_SloFE-mJcDFAXKNCMOC9ruCtaSGL_khgcZIQpy44vyzsesnUDG-x4LGWkqajjpk3q9auKJzS54ZIkmFf0XHHxp7yRE8xsNY2s6z6AvOxGps2c5U4zGMdqsJb3H8p6cX&c=lp7IaE0-t4a1kkAcJ28bgAwY3Mllgx4AIG_ZqpnzU_g47L7keWoJbA==&ch=Erdr-VEn011pOZagBt9lVzi-16BIttSo4Bdu6pIXLiLKHFjW_nT7xA==)
---
| | | Fellow Conservative, Today, I'm writing to ask you to consider becoming a part of the movement that can transform america. Free enterprise, limited government, individual freedom, traditional American values, and a strong national defense--these are the values that we fight for every single day. As the nation's largest, most broadly-supported think tank, The Heritage Foundation has long been the bastion of the American conservative movement. And with more than 500,000 members, our ranks are growing stronger every day. And now, you can join us and help to ensure that your values are being advanced in Washington, in the Media, and across this great nation. **Conservative leadership listens to Heritage.** In 1980, just as Reagan was beginning his first term in office, The Heritage Foundation developed the "Mandate for Leadership," a detailed policy manual on everything from taxes and regulation to trade and national defense. Reagan used this Mandate to help realize his vision of an America the world could admire once again. When President Trump took office just a few short years ago, The Heritage Foundation presented him with another Mandate for Leadership, focused on undoing the damage of the progressive agenda Obama forced upon the American people. And just as Reagan did, Trump adopted the Mandate as his blueprint for making limited government and conservative values a reality in our generation. Already, his administration has implemented more than two-thirds of the Mandate and moved the country closer to the conservative vision than it has been in decades. There is a lot of work left to do--and Heritage is in the best position to do it. We have been named the most influential public policy think tank in the world by the University of Pennsylvania (for two years in a row). With your help, we can wield that influence to reclaim America for generations to come. [Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NeYQYwIhunLAqnD3hIrHwmI7ZXb551GeNTk0aRtWAlOruChWeANEcKhb80-52Ji2pMApm7CHIka0u8DuFN-YlcNhHvDrhJtIUTWwY9ysmapJs6uBDMaiSvLQB0C2ZbYsShnQpfTD8AiRWTPFyNQ1Z0rJQTZKYAinEn1LrUT1MKcnxQElTdi50lyJ3hyqZ3RqV6IQMOlGIy_nKxTQIk0KUkMWsB8qfwu9_SloFE-mJcDFAXKNCMOC9ruCtaSGL_khgcZIQpy44vyzsesnUDG-x4LGWkqajjpk3q9auKJzS54ZIkmFf0XHHxp7yRE8xsNY2s6z6AvOxGps2c5U4zGMdqsJb3H8p6cX&c=lp7IaE0-t4a1kkAcJ28bgAwY3Mllgx4AIG_ZqpnzU_g47L7keWoJbA==&ch=Erdr-VEn011pOZagBt9lVzi-16BIttSo4Bdu6pIXLiLKHFjW_nT7xA==)
## Enough is enough--it is time to reverse our course.
The Heritage Foundation has the policy solutions that can make America that "shining city upon a hill" once again. And we are strategically positioned to do just that:
* **President Donald Trump stands with Heritage** , saying "For nearly half a century, Heritage has been titans in the fight to defend, promote, and preserve our great American Heritage."

* **Heritage employs some of the smartest minds in Washington.** With over 100 policy experts, Heritage truly has the talent to be able to solve complex policy issues, with simple and effective conservative solutions. As Rush Limbaugh has said, "Some of the finest conservative scholars alive today, live, work, and breathe at The Heritage Foundation."

* **Heritage has a media distribution network second to none.** Millions of Americans visit our Daily Signal website each year, bypassing the mainstream media filter to get the facts. Heritage experts appear on television and radio dozens of times each week, publish hundreds of sound policy research reports annually, and host hundreds of meetings a year with grassroots leaders and local and national officials.

* **Heritage is located right in the belly of the beast.** Location is everything. Heritage is the largest single land owner on Capitol Hill, with offices just 1000 steps from the House and 500 steps from the Senate. This strategic location gives us access to lawmakers and public officials that need to be equipped with policy solutions that represent your conservative principles.

[Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NeYQYwIhunLAqnD3hIrHwmI7ZXb551GeNTk0aRtWAlOruChWeANEcKhb80-52Ji2pMApm7CHIka0u8DuFN-YlcNhHvDrhJtIUTWwY9ysmapJs6uBDMaiSvLQB0C2ZbYsShnQpfTD8AiRWTPFyNQ1Z0rJQTZKYAinEn1LrUT1MKcnxQElTdi50lyJ3hyqZ3RqV6IQMOlGIy_nKxTQIk0KUkMWsB8qfwu9_SloFE-mJcDFAXKNCMOC9ruCtaSGL_khgcZIQpy44vyzsesnUDG-x4LGWkqajjpk3q9auKJzS54ZIkmFf0XHHxp7yRE8xsNY2s6z6AvOxGps2c5U4zGMdqsJb3H8p6cX&c=lp7IaE0-t4a1kkAcJ28bgAwY3Mllgx4AIG_ZqpnzU_g47L7keWoJbA==&ch=Erdr-VEn011pOZagBt9lVzi-16BIttSo4Bdu6pIXLiLKHFjW_nT7xA==)
## Get Exclusive Insider Access to Heritage When You Become a Member Today
When you become an official member of The Heritage Foundation, you are taking your place along with over 500,000 fellow conservatives that stand for conservative principles of free enterprise, limited government, individual liberty, traditional American values, and a strong national defense. But, as a member, you also get special access to content and benefits that are not available anywhere else: | | **Official Heritage Membership Card**
Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own exclusive membership card.
---|---
|
| **Special Invitations to Gatherings**
As a member, you will be invited to attend special gatherings where you can meet and network with Heritage staff and fellows as well as other conservatives that share your values.
|
| **Exclusive Updates from Our President**
We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of our your membership. Every member will receive regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington DC and across the country.
|
| **Subscription to the Morning Bell**
The Morning Bell arrives in your inbox first thing every weekday morning with the day's most important news, conservative commentary and policy analysis--in a fresh, visually rich, readable format for your desktop, tablet or phone. As a member, you will get a free subscription to the daily edition of the Morning Bell.
## Activate Your Membership to The Heritage Foundation Instantly
With your most generous tax-deductible gift of $25 or more, you will join over 500,000 Americans as an official member of The Heritage Foundation. Your membership will help to support our work to build an America where freedom, prosperity, opportunity and civil society flourish. Simply complete the form below and your membership will be instantly activated.
[Learn More Now >>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NeYQYwIhunLAqnD3hIrHwmI7ZXb551GeNTk0aRtWAlOruChWeANEcKhb80-52Ji2pMApm7CHIka0u8DuFN-YlcNhHvDrhJtIUTWwY9ysmapJs6uBDMaiSvLQB0C2ZbYsShnQpfTD8AiRWTPFyNQ1Z0rJQTZKYAinEn1LrUT1MKcnxQElTdi50lyJ3hyqZ3RqV6IQMOlGIy_nKxTQIk0KUkMWsB8qfwu9_SloFE-mJcDFAXKNCMOC9ruCtaSGL_khgcZIQpy44vyzsesnUDG-x4LGWkqajjpk3q9auKJzS54ZIkmFf0XHHxp7yRE8xsNY2s6z6AvOxGps2c5U4zGMdqsJb3H8p6cX&c=lp7IaE0-t4a1kkAcJ28bgAwY3Mllgx4AIG_ZqpnzU_g47L7keWoJbA==&ch=Erdr-VEn011pOZagBt9lVzi-16BIttSo4Bdu6pIXLiLKHFjW_nT7xA==)

I hope you will consider it.
Sincerely,
Kay C. James
President, The Heritage Foundation

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NeYQYwIhunLAqnD3hIrHwmI7ZXb551GeNTk0aRtWAlOruChWeANEcKhb80-52Ji2pMApm7CHIka0u8DuFN-YlcNhHvDrhJtIUTWwY9ysmapJs6uBDMaiSvLQB0C2ZbYsShnQpfTD8AiRWTPFyNQ1Z0rJQTZKYAinEn1LrUT1MKcnxQElTdi50lyJ3hyqZ3RqV6IQMOlGIy_nKxTQIk0KUkMWsB8qfwu9_SloFE-mJcDFAXKNCMOC9ruCtaSGL_khgcZIQpy44vyzsesnUDG-x4LGWkqajjpk3q9auKJzS54ZIkmFf0XHHxp7yRE8xsNY2s6z6AvOxGps2c5U4zGMdqsJb3H8p6cX&c=lp7IaE0-t4a1kkAcJ28bgAwY3Mllgx4AIG_ZqpnzU_g47L7keWoJbA==&ch=Erdr-VEn011pOZagBt9lVzi-16BIttSo4Bdu6pIXLiLKHFjW_nT7xA==)

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Parkland was two years ago today. Sign my petition if you agree we need to end the Senate filibuster to take action on gun violence.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE

| |

**PETITION: END THE SENATE FILIBUSTER**

Two years ago today, 17 innocent lives were taken in the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School shooting in Parkland, Florida. **Since then, almost nothing has changed due to unprecedented obstruction by Senate Republicans.

Gun safety legislation that would save lives is collecting dust on McConnell’s desk. We must eliminate the Senate filibuster in order to pass gun safety laws.**

**[Join our national petition drive to end the Senate filibuster.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15006477/157915301/-115914393?refcode=em021420-d&noskip=true&emci=2040858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=2940858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=463701&contactdata=hLezTKFOTBlTgxqcvMPxtF%2Bty5OVnpH2en9NX6Cw3NXo0zYMa3yMWPWtCkcbF5BXhUh1ppQwPjzqLu4mcpoOfthKZoaL2JfOl6aooe3mqSzwTFXXopKWF3y6kTuAtxAy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTQwODU4Yi01NjRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5sZW274AMfTt2yxTBGyg3GnSEdhCx20nKkfu2YNK0E=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15006478/157915302/-115914393?refcode=em021420-d&noskip=true&emci=2040858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=2940858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=463701&contactdata=hLezTKFOTBlTgxqcvMPxtF%2Bty5OVnpH2en9NX6Cw3NXo0zYMa3yMWPWtCkcbF5BXhUh1ppQwPjzqLu4mcpoOfthKZoaL2JfOl6aooe3mqSzwTFXXopKWF3y6kTuAtxAy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTQwODU4Yi01NjRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5sZW274AMfTt2yxTBGyg3GnSEdhCx20nKkfu2YNK0E=)

Friend,

If you had asked me a few years ago whether we should eliminate the Senate filibuster, I would have told you,_**“Absolutely not.”**_

But last August, days after 31 people were massacred in El Paso and Dayton, a bipartisan universal background check bill that Georgia’s own Representative Lucy McBath helped push through the House wasn’t even given a chance of being heard in the Senate. Mitch McConnell wouldn’t even consider it.

**I knew then that it was time for the filibuster to go.**

How in the world could a handful of Senate Republicans block any and all hearings on lifesaving legislation supported by the vast majority of Americans (including a majority of Republicans)?

The Parkland students who are standing up to the corporate gun lobby have been fighting for meaningful gun reforms ever since that tragic day two years ago. Thousands of families each year know the horror gun violence inflicts on our communities and are demanding action, marching in the street, and pushing for change.

Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party are bought and paid for by the NRA, an institution that has stopped representing responsible gun owners in order to shill for corporate gun manufacturers.

Those manufacturers have one objective – they want to sell more guns to earn higher profits. **And David Perdue is proud to do their bidding.**

As long as the Senate filibuster remains, we’ll need 60 votes to pass a single bill in the Senate. And that won’t happen anytime soon.

We can’t wait on 60 votes to stop domestic terrorism and white nationalism, to protect survivors of domestic violence from their abusers, to ban assault weapons and weapons of war on our streets, and to save the lives of innocent people and the brave law enforcement officers who must face these weapons every day. It is imperative that we pass red flag and universal background check laws to keep our communities safe. We know these laws save lives.

**The time for waiting is over. The time for action is now. The Senate filibuster must go.**

[**Add your name to our national petition drive if you agree that we need to eliminate the Senate filibuster once and for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15006479/157915303/-115914393?refcode=em021420-d&noskip=true&emci=2040858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=2940858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=463701&contactdata=hLezTKFOTBlTgxqcvMPxtF%2Bty5OVnpH2en9NX6Cw3NXo0zYMa3yMWPWtCkcbF5BXhUh1ppQwPjzqLu4mcpoOfthKZoaL2JfOl6aooe3mqSzwTFXXopKWF3y6kTuAtxAy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTQwODU4Yi01NjRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5sZW274AMfTt2yxTBGyg3GnSEdhCx20nKkfu2YNK0E=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15006480/157915304/-115914393?refcode=em021420-d&noskip=true&emci=2040858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=2940858b-564f-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=463701&contactdata=hLezTKFOTBlTgxqcvMPxtF%2Bty5OVnpH2en9NX6Cw3NXo0zYMa3yMWPWtCkcbF5BXhUh1ppQwPjzqLu4mcpoOfthKZoaL2JfOl6aooe3mqSzwTFXXopKWF3y6kTuAtxAy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTQwODU4Yi01NjRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5sZW274AMfTt2yxTBGyg3GnSEdhCx20nKkfu2YNK0E=)

Thank you for taking action.

Yours truly,
Teresa Tomlinson

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | | | | | PETITION: END THE SENATE FILIBUSTER Two years ago today, 17 innocent lives were taken in the Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School shooting in Parkland, Florida. Since then, almost nothing has changed due to unprecedented obstruction by Senate Republicans. Gun safety legislation that would save lives is collecting dust on McConnell’s desk. We must eliminate the Senate filibuster in order to pass gun safety laws. = = Friend, If you had asked me a few years ago whether we should eliminate the Senate filibuster, I would have told you,“Absolutely not.” But last August, days after 31 people were massacred in El Paso and Dayton, a bipartisan universal background check bill that Georgia’s own Representative Lucy McBath helped push through the House wasn’t even given a chance of being heard in the Senate. Mitch McConnell wouldn’t even consider it. I knew then that it was time for the filibuster to go. How in the world could a handful of Senate Republicans block any and all hearings on lifesaving legislation supported by the vast majority of Americans (including a majority of Republicans)? The Parkland students who are standing up to the corporate gun lobby have been fighting for meaningful gun reforms ever since that tragic day two years ago. Thousands of families each year know the horror gun violence inflicts on our communities and are demanding action, marching in the street, and pushing for change. Mitch McConnell and the Republican Party are bought and paid for by the NRA, an institution that has stopped representing responsible gun owners in order to shill for corporate gun manufacturers. Those manufacturers have one objective – they want to sell more guns to earn higher profits. And David Perdue is proud to do their bidding. As long as the Senate filibuster remains, we’ll need 60 votes to pass a single bill in the Senate. And that won’t happen anytime soon. We can’t wait on 60 votes to stop domestic terrorism and white nationalism, to protect survivors of domestic violence from their abusers, to ban assault weapons and weapons of war on our streets, and to save the lives of innocent people and the brave law enforcement officers who must face these weapons every day. It is imperative that we pass red flag and universal background check laws to keep our communities safe. We know these laws save lives. The time for waiting is over. The time for action is now. The Senate filibuster must go. = = Thank you for taking action. Yours truly, Teresa Tomlinson ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** ****** **************** PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906

Have you committed to vote for Elisa yet?
Hi Peter,
**First:** In 2018 far right Republican and Trump crony Dan Crenshaw was elected to Congress with less than 53% of the vote.
**Then:** Crenshaw began his tireless efforts to harm his own constituents — voting against lowering the costs of prescription drugs, promoting weapons of war on our streets, undermining efforts to aid flood victims — the list goes on.
**Now:** We’re building a grassroots campaign to make change right here in TX-02. Over the course of nearly a year, we have used the power of grassroots organizing to change attitudes from anger towards Crenshaw into hope that Elisa will deliver the new type of representation we need. This seat used to be safely red, but now the pundits are calling it flippable — because it’s going to take a veteran to show Crenshaw the door.

Today is a day to celebrate love, so I want to highlight Rita's compassion for her friends and neighbors. **[First, though, I want to remind you that Kim set a mid-month goal to raise $1,500 by tomorrow at midnight so we can keep listening to every voice in the district. A donation of even just $5 would go a long way towards helping us get there!](https://act.myngp.com/el/wuW0GUXMnVEJcZ9ER_41ZlNU3BTxBENot9ZySUfVFw0=/t0EN5GGKI8se_-HkcjE-N8ltM0M_97T1PyClnbNpXxg=?refcode=200214-email&amount=5)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wuW0GUXMnVEJcZ9ER_41ZlNU3BTxBENot9ZySUfVFw0=/t0EN5GGKI8se_-HkcjE-N8ltM0M_97T1PyClnbNpXxg=?refcode=200214-email) Rita truly cares about listening to every voice and every voter because she knows that's the only way to be the best representative she can be. When our leaders don't listen, it's easy to give in to cynicism and lose faith that we can change the direction of our country. That's why Rita wants to be a different kind of leader. She has the compassion to lead from a place of humility rather than hubris. She will listen, care enough to do something, and be a true advocate for all of us in Washington. But first, we need to make sure she wins in November. **[Show you want some"Hart" in Congress by making a donation to Rita today. clean_body: We have momentum. In the past two weeks alone, we were endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, New York Communities for Change, and the Hispanic Democrats of Westchester. | | | Friend, ** We have momentum. In the past two weeks alone, we were endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, New York Communities for Change, and the Hispanic Democrats of Westchester. I said from the beginning that we would run a campaign unlike anything voters in NY-17 have ever seen. But our fundraising isn’t where we need it to be. We are $7,532 below where we need to be by this weekend , and Money alone can’t win campaigns, but if we can’t hit our fundraising goals, our message will be drowned out by our self-funding opponents. One of our opponents has already given himself over $500,000. Another opponent has given himself $250,000. We don’t have that kind of money. But we have supporters like you. Sincerely, Mondaire ** | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: MJ Hegar TX Update
subject: 🚗 an update from the trail 🚗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and spoken to thousands of voters so far!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b42d/3954014262/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter -- With less than a week until early voting begins in the Texas primary, we're going full speed ahead to make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on and _defeats_ Sen. John Cornyn. **MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and spoken to thousands of voters so far, but we need your help to keep up the momentum!** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**In Austin, MJ took the stage for one of the most important primary debates yet, hosted by the Texas AFL-CIO**. As an Air Force veteran and working mom, MJ made a powerful case for why she's the candidate with the best chance to beat Sen. Cornyn! **[Pitch in to help us make it happen>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**In Houston, MJ sat down with the local chapter of Moms Demand Action** to talk about gun safety and how we can prevent gun violence in our communities. The short answer: kick Sen. Cornyn out of Washington! **[Make a donation to help us do it>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**And in Dallas, MJ participated in the _Dallas Examiner_ Forum**, answering questions about community policing, environmental justice, and getting money out of politics. **[Pitch in to help her keep going>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**There are just 13 days left until early voting begins, Peter -- so if you've been waiting to make a donation, the time is right now. Will you make your first* donation today to help MJ win the primary and BEAT Sen. Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
****[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b420/3954014262/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=5")****
****[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b426/3954014262/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10")****
****[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b424/3954014262/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=25")****
****[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b41b/3954014262/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=50")****
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b41a/3954014262/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__")****
Thanks,
Team MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905dd/7f51f7bc/4d3a9218/4ef1b423/3954014262/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkyMSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=20200214.1nd__921__&amount=10&recurring=true")

body:

---
| Patriot,
Can you believe that the Department of Justice just dropped its case against Andrew McCabe? This is an outrage and a miscarriage of justice.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017devGuJy8PeAe8mREzooGeyxVIj4v0k53EGUS1NHAYkPF0D-gSz7XTRksAKdXUs7R7UjzNjth-D3gZIHa-I_QKpOhK74pWTdIGq0XLkH0OEOOn7f4L5v6ss1OLKiksMvhpZRk8dyPmx0KVWl5tT7pqTHT-CB7iIe6uWhZGEZy0yx-vGS1OhlSA==&c=lo7D0oHWOOZCYaQF-2QyFpWCU4PuSUv03ikyysqPTKgl7-nhL2O1Fw==&ch=NjtRvdMCGuwOClrfZfzRFWOTN-PmzVftJm-Z3AOonMXw9Onvpa_IYg==)

| Andrew McCabe, along with Jim Comey and other top-level Deep State worshipers, hid evidence from the FISA court to obtain warrants, spied on President Trump's 2016 campaign, and then lied to FBI investigators about it. And so far, no one has faced consequences for those actions.
This is sick. The Deep State is about to get away with spying on a US Presidential campaign and trying to influence the 2016 election. We all know how that ended.
We can't be silent. Stand with me and demand accountability from these Deep State government bureaucrats! I will continue my fight against the Deep State, but I need you by my side.
---

MILITARY FAMILIES CAUCUS
http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn [http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn]
The Tennessee Democratic Party Veterans and Military Families Caucus released an open letter to demand Republican Senator Marsha Blackburnapologize for her attacks on Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman. Instead of defending the decorated veteran and his sacrifices for our country, Senator Blackburn contributed to the witness backlash by sending a series of tweets questioning his patriotism and ultimately resulting in the loss of Lt. Col. Vindman’s job. The letter denounces Senator Blackburn’s actions and asks her to apologize for treating a member of the military in such a disrespectful way simply because she disagreed with him. All Tennesseeans are invited to stand with Veterans and Military Families by signing the letter denouncing Senator Blackburn's behavior. Sign the letter now! [http://bit.ly/tndenblackburn]
PRESIDENTIAL PRIMARY EARLY
VOTING BEGAN THIS WEEK
Early voting starts this week, and runs through Tuesday, February 25th. Election Day - SUPER TUESDAY! - is Tuesday, March 3rd. A flat tire, sleeping through an alarm, or a meeting that runs late...life happens, so make your plan to vote EARLY.
https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php [https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php]
Early voting locations and times vary from county to county so contact your local county election commission [https://tnsos.org/elections/election_commissions.php] to find:

voting

&
hours
*

ballots

may
have
more
to

for
than

you

to

precinct,
which
you
can
search
for
here
[https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/]
.
Check your registration [https://tnmap.tn.gov/voterlookup/] and make a plan to vote now.
LISTEN NOW: TNDP PODCAST
http://tndppodcast.libsyn.com/now-you-know-right-to-work [http://tndppodcast.libsyn.com/now-you-know-right-to-work]
Governor Bill Lee is attempting to ban abortion in Tennessee by proposing the most extreme, comprehensive anti-abortion legislation that the state has ever seen, along with a slough of legislation to limit women’s rights and harm families. In this episode, Now You Know host and TNDP Chair, Mary Mancini, sits down with Tennessee Advocates for Planned Parenthood Executive Director, Francie Hunt. We walk through the political history of reproductive rights and the current war against them. Give it a listen - Now You Know: Women's Reproductive Rights [https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/if-you-dont-know-now-you-know/id1457122141]
Stand with families. Support reproductive rights and Tennessee Advocates for Planned Parenthood by signing their open letter to Governor Bill Lee. [https://www.weareplannedparenthoodaction.org/onlineactions/9RE-959GJU6_azhk8OThlw2]
HELP PROTECT THE VOTE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Voter%20Protection%20Training%20%281%29.png]
Find out how you can help protect the vote and ensure everyone's voice is heard at the polls this year. These training sessions will teach you the basics of voter protection and how to become a poll watcher on Super Tuesday, March 3rd 2020. Register for an event near you now:

BECOME A DNC DELEGATE
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/W2PUCM7OJBD3VA3PNH63RR26KE.jpg]
The deadline to apply to be a DNC Delegate is less than 15 days away. Visit TNDP's website for more details. [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-delegate-selection-plan/]
TWEETS OF THE WEEK
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-02-14%20at%2011.49.25%20AM.png]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Screen%20Shot%202020-02-13%20at%207.58.41%20PM.png]
SUPPORT STRONG CANDIDATES
The most impactful thing you can do to make the change you want to see in Tennessee, is to vote. But we also have to have strong candidates running good campaigns if we want to win and that's where your investment in our work is crucial. It’s expensive to maintain and expand TNDP operations in an election year. Paying for things like election protection training, candidate recruitment efforts, and campaign support are expensive – that’s why every dollar you contribute helps us win elections and fight back.
Thank you!

In just 8 days, Nevada will hold its caucuses for the 2020 Democratic nomination. In 16 days, South Carolina will hold its primary. And just 3 days after that, twelve states around the country will be voting on Super Tuesday.

Every dollar that we raise in the next 8 days goes right back out into critical advertising and organizing efforts in the Super Tuesday states, and building out more infrastructure for the long haul.

**That's why it's so important that we reach our goal of $7 million by the Nevada caucus. Anything you contribute would have a real, tangible impact in these final days -- and we need your help to make it happen.**

**[If you've been sitting on the sidelines, your support would have the most impact right now. >
This campaign was always built for the long haul. We have staff in over 30 states, volunteers knocking doors and organizing their communities in all 50 states, DC, and Puerto Rico, and an army of phone bankers and texters talking to voters everywhere about the issues that matter to them.

**With only 2% of the delegate share awarded so far, we're just getting started.** We have a plan to organize and win, but we need the resources to see it through -- and that's why we're relying on you.

Other candidates will probably hold fancy closed-door fundraisers with wealthy donors this week to raise money for the upcoming primaries. Not Elizabeth. We're doing this the right way: no PACs, no big bank executives, no closed door private fundraisers. Just grassroots donors, chipping in what they can.

Your support will send a powerful message to the ultra-wealthy trying to buy off our elections, to the naysayers who have counted us out, and to the corporate Wall Street interests trying to stop Elizabeth.

**[With your help, we can reach our goal, remain competitive through Super Tuesday, and finish building the groundwork to beat Donald Trump in November. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852afff/45c30650/1fe9ca5e4/66e56db8/2427742915/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzcxRl9FR0xfR09MX1RfMjAyMDAyMTRfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO71F_EGL_GOL_T_20200214_V1S1_P_T1")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

We have staff in over 30 states, volunteers knocking doors and organizing their communities in all 50 states, DC, and Puerto Rico, and an army of phone bankers and texters talking to voters everywhere about the issues that matter to them. With only 2% of the delegate share awarded so far, we're just getting started. We have a plan to organize and win, but we need the resources to see it through -- and that's why we're relying on you. Other candidates will probably hold fancy closed-door fundraisers with wealthy donors this week to raise money for the upcoming primaries. Not Elizabeth. We're doing this the right way: no PACs, no big bank executives, no closed door private fundraisers. Just grassroots donors, chipping in what they can. Your support will send a powerful message to the ultra-wealthy trying to buy off our elections, to the naysayers who have counted us out, and to the corporate Wall Street interests trying to stop Elizabeth. "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: Investing in our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:

Hi Peter,

It’s long overdue to address the climate crisis.

Here in Iowa, we’re already experiencing some of the repercussions of our changing climate. Our farmers are losing profit, crops, equipment, and their homes and fields from record-breaking floods, droughts, and frigid harvest seasons.

We need to bring folks from all walks of life -- farmers, rural communities, and those on the front lines of the climate crisis -- to the table to address this challenge and advance a more equitable clean energy future. **That’s why we’re proud to earn the endorsement of the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund.**

**[Are you committed to protecting our climate -- and our future? name: Congressman Al Green
subject: The next generation is calling on us to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/N18Yx-StdfqO1ULw0Y_4qWKAyBWutL1Y8H7GL8CsOM0=/2rP313FrgA9iWYqCbf6WbUMQkoYr4jvf203eCVpPxSA=)
---
| Folks, Two years ago today, we witnessed the deadliest high school shooting in our country's history in Parkland, Florida. A lone gunman armed with a semi-automatic weapon killed 17 people and injured 17 others in just 6 minutes. What set the shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School apart from others was the response from students. **They mourned -- and then they marched. They demanded that we take their grief to heart, that we act to prevent more tragedies and to keep children safe at school.** The Parkland shooter should not have been legally able to purchase a weapon capable of killing so many in just minutes. According to published reports, his repeated threats, behavioral issues, and violent social media posts were known to authorities -- but he did not receive the help he needed, and his classmates paid the price. **On this anniversary, thoughts and prayers are not enough. The next generation is calling on us to take action, and we have not done them justice.** It's time to heed their call -- to institute universal background checks and mandatory waiting periods, to prevent known violent individuals from accessing firearms, and to take weapons of war off our streets. I am proud and grateful to stand with you in this fight, and I look forward to a better tomorrow. In solidarity, Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/N18Yx-StdfqO1ULw0Y_4qWKAyBWutL1Y8H7GL8CsOM0=/63gW9QLbZo9dDbEdOVeVCJFwjDKGRAhuKomxloug--c=) here.

name: Team Hattersley
subject: fighting for love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15012780/157971309/1525607060?refcode=em_pet_2020.02.14_b1_TH_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjYxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGFmZjk4Yi02YzRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wNMD9D6Z0mlo6VNaYAduB9QtP64HJ3O4hOp2sgCqDes=)
---
| Hey Peter,

Happy Valentine’s Day! Everyone over at Team Hattersley is sending love to all our supporters today.

Love is a precious thing in this world, Peter. We wish it weren’t the case, but sometimes you have to fight hard for love. And stand up for all kinds of love.

**FL-15 needs a representative who will fight for all forms of love.** Ross Spano has sadly not done this. He opposed H.R. 5 last year, which would have granted historic protections for our LGBTQ brothers and sisters. If that wasn’t enough, Spano even voted to allow adoption agencies to refuse the placement of children that desperately need a loving home to gay couples.

**LGBTQ equality has always been one of my top priorities.** I got into politics in the first place to run against **an extreme politician who had gotten Pride banned** in our county for 8 years. Since I've been elected, I've been a champion for LGBTQ workplace protections and the rights of LGBTQ youth. As a member of Congress **I will always fight for our LGBTQ friends and neighbors.**

[**On this Valentine’s Day, we demand that every citizen of FL-15 deserves to have their love protected free from discrimination. Can you sign our petition demanding that every member of our community have their love protected, Peter?**](https://secure.ngpvan.com/naLoxtAuek-D0XF6D6O0oA2)
| ****[Sign Our Valentine’s Day Petition](https://secure.ngpvan.com/naLoxtAuek-D0XF6D6O0oA2)****
---
Thanks for fighting for love.

-Team Hattersley

****_Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District._****

clean_body: = | Hey Peter, Happy Valentine’s Day! Everyone over at Team Hattersley is sending love to all our supporters today. Love is a precious thing in this world, Peter. We wish it weren’t the case, but sometimes you have to fight hard for love. And stand up for all kinds of love. FL-15 needs a representative who will fight for all forms of love. Ross Spano has sadly not done this. He opposed H.R. 5 last year, which would have granted historic protections for our LGBTQ brothers and sisters. If that wasn’t enough, Spano even voted to allow adoption agencies to refuse the placement of children that desperately need a loving home to gay couples. LGBTQ equality has always been one of my top priorities. I got into politics in the first place to run against an extreme politician who had gotten Pride banned in our county for 8 years. Since I've been elected, I've been a champion for LGBTQ workplace protections and the rights of LGBTQ youth. As a member of Congress I will always fight for our LGBTQ friends and neighbors. | ** Thanks for fighting for love. -Team Hattersley Adam Hattersley is Navy Veteran and local state representative working to flip Florida's 15th Congressional District. = | =** = = | Adam Hattersley is running to represent Florida's 15th Congressional District. Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.
clean_body: Unemployment is at a record low, wages are going up, and blue collar Hoosiers across our state are winning. Friend, Earlier this month, the President made it clear — we’re in the middle of a Blue Collar Boom. Unemployment is at a record low, wages are going up, and blue collar Hoosiers across our state are winning. But we can’t take anything for granted. Socialism is on the doorstep and if we don’t take back the House in 2020, everything that we’ve fought for could be put at risk. The policies being pushed by the left — the Green New Deal, Medicare-for-all, and higher taxes for Indiana families — would kill Indiana’s Blue Collar Boom. Some of the the leading 2020 Democrats, like socialist Bernie Sanders, even attacked the bipartisan, free and fair USMCA trade deal on the debate stage earlier this week. Friend, there’s only one way to ensure that we keep Indiana booming in 2020 and beyond — taking back the House and turning it red. But we can’t do it alone. We need the help of conservative grassroots donors who are 100% committed to keeping the Blue Collar Boom going in Indiana. Help Greg Turn the House Red - Thanks, Pence Fundraising Team | | | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.
