subject: Loss after loss after loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The DSCC just publicly backed our opponent in the primary. They don’t believe that Kentuckians should get to decide who faces off against Mitch McConnell.
#
The DSCC just publicly backed our opponent in the primary. They don’t believe that Kentuckians should get to decide who faces off against Mitch McConnell.
The DC party bosses think they know better than us.
Well, they don’t.
For years, the party establishment has run against Mitch McConnell on a “Republican Lite” platform. Their hand picked candidates have run away from the bold ideas that motivate our base and bring in new voters. The result has been loss after loss after loss.
**Today is an important day for our campaign. We need to raise a lot of money to show Charles can compete even as the DSCC comes after us.**
[**Will you add a $5 donation right now as a way of saying you’ve had it with the DC establishment handpicking their preferred nominees?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15014050/157984295/-632115979?refcode=em20200214-pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzRkZWE1Yy03MTRmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y9NyMqEAP_SI4DVSECQw94tX2Z8f0PyDgno0C62cwsk=)

subject: It's not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:

Fellow Conservative,

When I started this campaign for Georgia’s 7th Congressional District, I was determined to follow through, win or lose -- but sometimes things don’t work out the way we plan.

Unfortunately, **I have had to suspend my campaign to focus on my health,** but I want to assure everyone that has supported me with volunteer work, prayers, and financial generosity that I am still committed to the conservative values we share and Republican victory in 2020.

This movement was never just about me, but about our principles, our communities and our great country, and I’m certain we’ll move forward with wonderful republicans who are ready to lead, **[like my friend Major Sam Peters running for Congress in Nevada.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=06be1c6cb233493197112b88dca622d6&_e=O8VnU_G_rNYWFLXWAtjBcDogbox_3fuC4f-iRAOOQfdZWnFdrq0pxtxr0-pIEemFzXHpDwvLbx58jEsqxfptwlzFRyp8J_cI7ElKAeksuzbfsw1n-tZgjdIQJ6LROt29s9MNmqUACfuuYIqELjqOYDlvn0OAmaRY18zBm7OYt396I4T38CIoczCXtz-qdNnQGEB0-D8S8IQmYia_o1CjubRfQbPOKm2tSCGgGLn5kXVk1O7Gw_jLPOmjGX_Wl0vercR19iLjC2mKOH2iQXGYaq-cjgOjGgZH4MOKpFMNfoCUNQNOGq5hMkJ3i2P4rtcM1cDX0PZ5RlNXJPvO2qqwBw%3D%3D)**

For more information on Sam's campaign, you can visit **[Sam's website today!](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=06be1c6cb233493197112b88dca622d6&_e=O8VnU_G_rNYWFLXWAtjBcGWFQb-GxqzwldqjWiTKraZx2FYvjAE28J4l0LsYgFmFAXfwCbJjKPtJiKwDxOeRIVKKGN9e3Xhd89R-iwRphvl67lPsfLY-VmBOoGJS94xYT1brS-aFzJ5equN05S26up-8ZZXm4fcsLiZCL5_GoGDccQiwYxnrrtzqpPyZ-269tGS7cNLAvqqgcIHek8HFccX-jGRH12ywEJabTmWPFcnuQOiFRS84m75ox4V0EcUFuEMF8jeq23h-gHcNen77Jw%3D%3D)**

I’m honored to receive the official endorsement of President Donald Trump! When I was in Congress, I worked closely with the president to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York. With his support, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more. clean_body: February is only halfway over, but it’s already been a busy month for the campaign. Peter, with impeachment, endorsements, and fundraising reports, February has already been a busy month, and it’s only halfway over! Here’s what my campaign has been up to over the past couple weeks. | | | | | Endorsed by President Trump | I’m honored to receive the official endorsement of President Donald Trump! When I was in Congress, I worked closely with the president to deliver real results for the people of Upstate New York. With his support, I was able to deliver historic tax reform, dramatically reduce burdensome and unnecessary regulations, provide increased funding to Upstate New York’s military assets, and so much more. I look forward to getting back to work in Washington. View and share the post. | Announced $300,000 Raised in First Three Months of the Race | I was proud to announce that my campaign raised over $300,000 in the first three months of our campaign, including donations from every county in the district! This makes me the strongest challenger to Anthony Brindisi and one of the strongest challenger candidates in the country. Help keep our momentum going and join our team today: View and share the post . | Anthony Brindisi’s Ultra-Liberal Voting Record | He claims to be bipartisan, but Anthony Brindisi only votes with President Trump 9.2% of the time and voted THREE times for impeachment. We deserve better! Add your name to stand up to Anthony Brindisi and his ultra-liberal voting record. View and share the post . | Elise Stefanik Endorsed Our Campaign | Elise Stefanik has been the leading voice in getting more Republican women elected to Congress. I am honored to have her endorsement and look forward to working with her once again in Congress. Join our campaign here: View and share the post . | President Trump’s Impeachment Trial Over | Democrats’ failed impeachment trial is finally over, but we can’t forget Anthony Brindisi’s betrayal. In 2016, our district voted for President Trump by 15%. Three years later, Brindisi voted for impeachment THREE TIMES after saying he wouldn’t support it. Add your name to stand up to Brindisi’s betrayal! name: Barack Obama Update
subject: Obama is asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!
[](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY5NjEyMjMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg5NjY4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
There are critical governors' races coming up this year, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. **Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats in 2020.******
**
We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found:**
**Name:** Top Supporter
**Supporter ID:** 8751682
**Given to stop Trump today?** **NO**
Hitting every single fundraising goal is the _ONLY_ way we can beat Trump and his GOP allies - but right now, we're falling way short of our $25,000 mid-month goal, and we're running out of time.**Luckily, a group of donors is MATCHING every gift 2X to help us raise another $11,475 before midnight tomorrow. **
**[Team, we need you to stand with Obama and donate $1 or more right now. Every dollar will be DOUBLED to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, defeat Republicans and STOP Trump:](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY5NjEyMjMS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDg5NjY4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

clean_body: | | | We were starting to lose hope, Team. Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF! There are critical governors' races coming up this year, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats in 2020.** We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found: Name: Top Supporter Supporter ID: 8751682 Given to stop Trump today? NO Hitting every single fundraising goal is the ONLY way we can beat Trump and his GOP allies - but right now, we're falling way short of our $25,000 mid-month goal, and we're running out of time.Luckily, a group of donors is MATCHING every gift 2X to help us raise another $11,475 before midnight tomorrow. ** __ | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Messner
subject: Updates from the campaign trail!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/58554200087ef453c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Donate Now! ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/8de2d84c72d8176ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/3f20623a2734ef64c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Way to go New Hampshire!**

The 2020 First-in-The-Nation New Hampshire Primary once again demonstrated Granite Staters’ commitment to common sense and conservative values. President Trump’s vote totals went through the roof - in the words of the _Concord Monitor_ , his primary win was “historic in size,” as he got more votes than any other incumbent president - more than double the votes cast for Obama in 2012 and George W. Bush in 2004.
As for Senator Shaheen’s party... well, we’ve seen that the Democrat Party has leaned so far left, its first primary winner is a self-described Democratic Socialist. Bernie Sanders’ first-place finish makes it clear that Big Brother-Big Government is looming if we don’t stand with our President and our party. Shaheen’s party? Well, the party’s about to be over!
|
---
**In the News**
Corky hit the airwaves during primary week, joining New Hampshire’s own Jack Heath and John Fredericks.

Jack Heath is well-known to Granite Staters for his upfront style and political savvy, and he chatted with Corky about possible election outcomes and New Hampshire’s starring role as the nation’s first primary.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/f70b522bc09f46aac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Fredericks is a nationally syndicated radio host, commentator and newspaper columnist who’s covered national news - he was the first media personality in America to endorse Trump for President. [**Here’s a link to the interview**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/07a2f5d2f356803dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Quick Pic**
Who did Corky bump into as he made the rounds of polling places on Primary Day but New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu at the polls in Bedford. He gets what makes New Hampshire great, and we agree with Governor Sununu that our message is resonating with like-minded folks across the Granite State!
|
---
**Campaign Notes: Where's Corky?**
We’ve made it our mission to get out and talk to folks across this great state, and we’ve certainly been racking up the miles! We’ve hosted more than a dozen town halls, we’ve spoken to local groups big and small, and Corky had 15 stops this week ranging from polling place visits to business tours. We’ll continue to reach out to folks across the Granite State with our message.
What is that message, in a nutshell? Corky tells folks it’s simple: limited government, fiscal responsibility, accountability, and a strong defense.

Is that what Senator Shaheen stands for? Any of those goals? A quick check of her voting record in the Senate will show she does not represent New Hampshire values.

Thanks to Corky’s non-stop travel schedule (can’t wait for those frost heaves later in the season!), he gets to meet wonderful people like Kenneth Lance, shown here, and visit wonderful places, like his Muddy Road Brewery in New Durham. It’s small businesses like this that need someone in the Senate who can relate to what it’s like to be in business.
|
---
**Upcoming Events**
Windham Republican Committee
DATE: Thursday, February 20th, 7- 8:30 p.m.
Windham Senior Center, 2 N Lowell Rd, Windham, NH 03087
**[RSVP on Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/18943d7d206793d4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

**A Cold One with Corky
DATE: Thursday, February 20th, 11:30 a.m. - 1:30 p.m.
The Barley House "B-Lounge"
_*(Private event for General Court members)_

Dartmouth College Republicans*
DATE: Tuesday, February 18th, 4:30-6 p.m.
_*(Private event for organization members)_
|
---
**Messner Minute - The American Dream**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/c75e5bf01afc0fdfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Our recent Messner Minute focuses on Senator Shaheen’s criticism of Corky being successful. Well, there’s nothing wrong with success – he’s a great example of the American dream, a boy raised in a blue-collar household who went to West Point, who worked hard and achieved his goals. His campaign for the Senate is based on his belief that EVERYONE has the same opportunity – so **[check out this Messner Minute](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/2701e78998bf3a76c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**!
|
---
**Learn more!**
Follow us on **[Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/3c9dc416ce01a6ddc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** and **[Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/bc425928275ebad5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** and visit our website at **[corkyforsenate.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1a240c8f0b7c83f9/042a413fba27203ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

Friend, First off, we hope you and yours have a great Valentine's today. Do you already have plans for your loved one today? If you don't yet that's alright, we have the perfect thing for you to do. body:
Elizabeth hasn't been getting the same kind of media coverage as candidates she outperformed. The night of the Iowa Caucuses, CNN didn't air Elizabeth's full speech. But they aired the speeches of... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852af0f/45c30650/1fe71a21b/66e56a7c/2454500277/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Elizabeth hasn't been getting the same kind of media coverage as candidates she outperformed.

The night of the Iowa Caucuses, CNN didn't air Elizabeth's full speech. But they aired the speeches of other candidates she beat.

In New Hampshire on Tuesday night, networks played Vice President Biden's speech from South Carolina despite the fact that he left the state before polls closed -- but not Elizabeth's even though she outperformed him, again.

Elizabeth knows what it's like to be counted out early, because it's happened before. But right now, 55 states and territories have still yet to vote. 98% of delegates are still up for grabs. **We can't count on the media to cover our campaign fairly, so we're taking our case directly to voters.**

Elizabeth needs your help today to give our campaign the resources to go up on the air, get our message out, and remain competitive through Super Tuesday.

**[Can you chip in $2 or anything you can to help make sure voters hear from Elizabeth? Every dollar brings us one powerful step closer to our $7 million goal before the Nevada caucuses:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852af0f/45c30650/1fe71a21b/66e56a7f/2454500277/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzY1Rl9FR0xfTUVEX1FfMjAyMDAyMTRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO65F_EGL_MED_Q_20200214_V1S3_P")**

name: Tom Steyer
subject: What’s the price tag?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Affordable health care must be a universal right, not a privilege. This is something that all my Democratic peers and I agree on. But how we get there is a different story. **I’m calling on Senator Bernie Sanders to disclose the actual price tag of his Medicare for All plan.** Medicare for All would take away existing health care plans that many unions, like Culinary 226 in Nevada, have fought hard to secure. Americans have a lot to lose under Senator Sanders’ plan, and they deserve to see how much the plan costs. Without knowing what it will actually cost, a Medicare for All plan exponentially increases the financial risk of achieving universal coverage. We _can_ provide high quality, affordable health care for every person living in this country by building on the Affordable Care Act and providing a competitive public option. My health care plan does just that — and allows people to make their own decisions on what’s best for them and their families. It leverages the government’s buying power to drive down costs without overhauling the entire system. We can achieve universal care without kicking people off their current plans or taking on unnecessary financial risk. **_[Add your name if you want to see the price tag for Medicare for All as Democrats decide who can beat Trump.](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=M5l2K6CF-2BTeSi2jZtEX6WDq0JgL4SZ9fws6CW-2B-2BU1P1oE963IOpDZJmQsB-2BOQMrb-2B55XVb8KjkqJf-2Ff7LTgZCKnxKcIPuWeecRxXn55D-2FDwSo1gdCCW6RfEimr-2BXKZhAV4BPvsTAXqIU-2B5NRrOjE05RtCl9ESXek-2FTO8YSVcs1Nr9p3Ze-2BxXXjVqIaqwjINH2o6dvUggajda7zLqkzBddZJvdh2CJyvHioA-2FctMnsUEdSXrNYysq7-2BB6iYTKkUD4Ax2o_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjI06VISPfJIPkjxFld-2BrrlsLfWBgSznyC9eEQeuE67ByW7-2F4rW5t238CYEo3QD0YfCGXH5BviNZ-2BwxX85ro3wxJDFMsY5U-2B08imPLoMCGBajHKjMyBb9d24jpkCx-2FUe675h5KUFRxyLtEcvFWRd1QxOeBiBRmBjuFzxHXALBy4qBknj-2Bn1sie7Z5bAUR-2BLm2fSIY2VojJIamWfprEW6idAS5qYMuHwmR1URoMIFW4PWfhDKkXiealjjSjxD6D8t2eG9Bvj8IHSKvi-2BUQZLy9MhrckY3WiOukdM4-2B9T7kCe3fbTHmhgacq5g9HJgzXk3sDtCr-2BpZLHYtJeiCSlNKN3fzyKDlWw7R5T1Uq9w6ZmWlCzysG5JeSCwj0E8-2FZUB9C6qMMiASxSj7IIP8TdqqgtjNvddBSC-2B-2FvP4kkfqGYunwA-3D-3D)_** Thanks,
Tom

clean_body: | | | | Affordable health care must be a universal right, not a privilege. This is something that all my Democratic peers and I agree on. But how we get there is a different story. I’m calling on Senator Bernie Sanders to disclose the actual price tag of his Medicare for All plan. Medicare for All would take away existing health care plans that many unions, like Culinary 226 in Nevada, have fought hard to secure. Americans have a lot to lose under Senator Sanders’ plan, and they deserve to see how much the plan costs. Without knowing what it will actually cost, a Medicare for All plan exponentially increases the financial risk of achieving universal coverage. We can provide high quality, affordable health care for every person living in this country by building on the Affordable Care Act and providing a competitive public option. My health care plan does just that — and allows people to make their own decisions on what’s best for them and their families. It leverages the government’s buying power to drive down costs without overhauling the entire system. We can achieve universal care without kicking people off their current plans or taking on unnecessary financial risk. Thanks, Tom | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! body:
It’s Valentine’s Day, so I want to share with you my love for my dear wife, Maddie. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=5b91c0c51e7b403e97942c55833a9c9f&_e=rJuFh-Lc37dppEy5dlzwxUuodtHITnWRGs5-xWZz128LbFPJQlZ2qzYlhLQSpivDg3U7Sjq_DHdmmC4RKp0YNAfUM3meAP5U1ZuFE98Zvgue1hPv1OPPbPZ84WWmt1Ci3kUWCuI5ODUAvpgP3syDHee3YZgIx6dqp_HWlYohuksLd6cCotkwP9NzGxDixZD_kD5QCpFi9i4mCUByYR_PDouKRnh7AdYr1z_ITxpJDosHedJnTrVCQsbcGX9_mWfsVA-7T2nazQp-dhTrmOm2gVpIj2Sur_OurKAmEuyjk7Eu_m5xO1vTd7xnOCV9145an3GC7PZ83sneSWDSOcUXwHbnxxDRYbx25hapAHfXxbRaxWJdFClwYdx5cuU6czAJQlehSI81Y1GcaGahZXWiiIDtvmGP559LJqcNpuqMSkj0BGSZHoKEUfEGl5dasr_EkEQpvQ1tyUOQ0RmsaLQO94waR9jwtV5Z4vubcntpSjc%3D) Friends, It’s Valentine’s Day, so I want to share with you my love for my dear wife, Maddie. Maddie is one of the most compassionate people I’ve ever had the privilege to meet. She cares deeply about our community, not just as a concept, but every single person on a human level. She’s the kind of person who just draws people to her -- everyone knows that they have a friend in Maddie. Not falling in love with her was never an option. [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=5b91c0c51e7b403e97942c55833a9c9f&_e=rJuFh-Lc37dppEy5dlzwxUuodtHITnWRGs5-xWZz128LbFPJQlZ2qzYlhLQSpivDg3U7Sjq_DHdmmC4RKp0YNAfUM3meAP5U1ZuFE98Zvgue1hPv1OPPbPZ84WWmt1Ci3kUWCuI5ODUAvpgP3syDHee3YZgIx6dqp_HWlYohuksLd6cCotkwP9NzGxDixZD_kD5QCpFi9i4mCUByYR_PDouKRnh7AdYr1z_ITxpJDosHedJnTrVCQsbcGX9_mWfsVA-7T2nazQp-dhTrmOm2gSdRyjq1fbOTu0Q5aP8hApDwl86RScHzOplUn10OO0OH6fpkk2XyhwnCT-b9wzkj4Ye2a43Ra_VwPASpC6wYpR3hI2p5XHirgG9sKZ94l_tRYg7P54uDT-mEPnIxFWmJI4yYrQhobPeNHwp4OXWY6jIkGpGwZnJUQFgC2AvXtu7tw0OldY_-mw-yvfOonV1e8W5A9y8AfE3d6EyG6ozu65E%3D) I’m also so proud of her service to our country. From serving our nation as a nurse in the armed forces to working at the VA helping veterans get the care and attention they deserve, she’s the one who continues to inspire me to be the best civil servant I can be. Maddie is also an integral part of this campaign because she helps me keep going on the hardest days. Her passion for helping others is infectious. If you’ve met her, I’m sure you’ve felt it too. Thank you for letting me take a moment to send what will be the most important email of the year! name: Laura Loomer
subject: Happy Valentine’s Day Patriot
body:
I want to wish you a Happy Valentine’s Day! While you exchange flowers and chocolate with your loved ones, share this story that shows the power of relationships and love.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364327-853629-4865653-7806956fdb-5de0439bc3)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364327-853629-4865653-7806956fdb-5de0439bc3) I want to wish you a Happy Valentine’s Day!

While you exchange flowers and chocolate with your loved ones, share this story that shows the power of relationships and love.

. . . and if you want to send me [**a special Valentine’s gift by donating to my campaign**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364327-853629-4865653-7806956fdb-5de0439bc3), I would LOVE it!

The legend of St. Valentine starts – like many stories – with the tyranny of government.

Roman Emperor Claudius II wanted better soldiers and believed that single men fought better than soldiers with wives and families.

To keep his ranks filled with the best warriors, Claudius banned young men from marrying.

But the decree from the Roman government couldn’t stop young lovers from vowing their faith and lives to one another.

In secret, they were married by a local priest named Valentine.

The priest defied the unjust decree from Claudius and on February 14th, 269, Valentine was put to death.

St. Valentine’s remains lay in Rome today with a crown of roses resting atop his brow.

Love is one VERY strong aspect of Liberty and it can’t be controlled or contained by government.

Love and Liberty will ALWAYS find a way, and there will always be men and women like St. Valentine willing to risk their lives for it.

And in the end, Emperor Claudius was wrong.

When you have something to fight for, a wife, husband, son, daughter, mother, father or simply a friend, you don’t give up. **You fight like a lion protecting its pride.**

I am a single woman, there were no chocolates on my pillow this morning and no flowers delivered to my door. But I’m still filled with love and passion because **I unconditionally love our nation and what we stand for**.

**And I fight for it every day that I wake up so that we can enjoy the freedoms of Liberty and Love.**

While it’s a bit selfish to request a Valentine’s Day gift, [**please send a donation to my campaign today, so I can keep fighting for you and all of the other Americans whom I love**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-364327-853629-4865653-7806956fdb-5de0439bc3).

Thank you again for all that you do, and please enjoy this special day with those you love.

Sincerely,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: I want to wish you a Happy Valentine’s Day! While you exchange flowers and chocolate with your loved ones, share this story that shows the power of relationships and love. | | | Patriot, I want to wish you a Happy Valentine’s Day! While you exchange flowers and chocolate with your loved ones, share this story that shows the power of relationships and love. . . . and if you want to send me , I would LOVE it! The legend of St. Valentine starts – like many stories – with the tyranny of government. Roman Emperor Claudius II wanted better soldiers and believed that single men fought better than soldiers with wives and families. To keep his ranks filled with the best warriors, Claudius banned young men from marrying. But the decree from the Roman government couldn’t stop young lovers from vowing their faith and lives to one another. In secret, they were married by a local priest named Valentine. The priest defied the unjust decree from Claudius and on February 14th, 269, Valentine was put to death. St. Valentine’s remains lay in Rome today with a crown of roses resting atop his brow. Love is one VERY strong aspect of Liberty and it can’t be controlled or contained by government. Love and Liberty will ALWAYS find a way, and there will always be men and women like St. Valentine willing to risk their lives for it. And in the end, Emperor Claudius was wrong. When you have something to fight for, a wife, husband, son, daughter, mother, father or simply a friend, you don’t give up. You fight like a lion protecting its pride. I am a single woman, there were no chocolates on my pillow this morning and no flowers delivered to my door. But I’m still filled with love and passion because I unconditionally love our nation and what we stand for. And I fight for it every day that I wake up so that we can enjoy the freedoms of Liberty and Love. While it’s a bit selfish to request a Valentine’s Day gift, . body:
This Valentine's Day, we're thinking about what we love most about Virginia -- and we want to hear from you!
|
---
| | Derek --

This Valentine's Day, we're thinking about what we love most about Virginia -- and we want to hear from you! Will you fill out our short survey about what you love most about the Commonwealth, and what you want Mark to focus on in the Senate? **[Take our Valentine 's Day survey now](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d608/53d9897e/5366ef1e/1c89b947/4195916261/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-valentine")** To give you some inspiration, we asked some members of Team Warner what they love most about the Commonwealth. Here's what they had to say: | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d608/53d9897e/5366ef1e/1c89b947/4195916261/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-valentine")

Thank you,

Mark Warner Survey Team

body:
Friends, We need your immediate assistance.

Tom O’Halleran betrayed our district and he must be held accountable. Wearing a purple tie and claiming to be bipartisan at the State of the Union isn’t going to cut it; it’s time to **show him that Arizonans have had enough of his partisan politics. ** [ **Hold Tom Accountable** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fdb3d45ef44d4bfa95d925aa36a68fab&_e=ADRhf81K2_mSE7ITigjBWRkX5eWqBPj66TMYHvuWIBLIVUInYLC4O8-mREsxbRLE_umq15BGIG9YkO-HVd_-UUBGwyGWPAuaNU9KItf5ZmRsqJ78J2f4-YXrbCLgzfznNpAZCk_xGScZZlELCKBGQCo3qlB0RzVDFT0DjohYKMx08LsxMl0_ggxiRRLQvRHvzKJh4cxiC4LYf1Xk9ehNTW9CqGNOUQv4-vSIc67NCSxeL9WA-za8EBCw_O69cGY-O8eu20YZcQN9vrjru3Z6HquoJ1Ed5HF4GstgSdRZA0rjHyXIePFCXcfBT1jo4HJmvlZl4Uyv88rbHfFkxisRxSkNaTwmK_ZJo6f267ZR-15uLLKnwam6Yf0AqviTTwAlqnQOfNnlZPItr-4lw8EKRM2Moieq9pjh_CPISKp-zFc%3D) Tiffany Shedd is a staunch defender of President Trump and she will stand with the people of Arizona’s First Congressional District, unlike Pelosi puppet O’Halleran. Friends,** ****President Trump needs more allies in the House, and Tiffany is looking to fill that role. **
**[Add your name to our growing list of Trump supporters who oppose the partisan impeachment Democrats>>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fdb3d45ef44d4bfa95d925aa36a68fab&_e=ADRhf81K2_mSE7ITigjBWRkX5eWqBPj66TMYHvuWIBLIVUInYLC4O8-mREsxbRLE_umq15BGIG9YkO-HVd_-UUBGwyGWPAuaNU9KItf5ZmRsqJ78J2f4-YXrbCLgzfznNpAZCk_xGScZZlELCKBGQCo3qlB0RzVDFT0DjohYKMx08LsxMl0_ggxiRRLQvRHvfgkTjQfzwwNxMeGOf4XUALn31WjDlyc7rCBwmd_5VYARZ3Goe3L1KGbd_jN6kIGuN4rgvL1BkNrpKniZfQJMBbquSn4aatieHI99PrJrdMW0FHSigKU1gpL9QECu63BxLLPeqTMSziWf6YBs3-HuN6eQpa-TFxP49pb8OC6WTvYTTbs3aPqXXbqHJKVV8vWHByKzJcKt79nN2J9uQYOabXapnEqHXsneF5lQTWAkLQ4%3D)**
We can do this!
Arizona can not afford another two years of Tom O’Halleran and his radical agenda. Friends, President Trump needs more allies in the House, and Tiffany is looking to fill that role. We can do this! Arizona can not afford another two years of Tom O’Halleran and his radical agenda. Thank you for your support, Team Shedd Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: If you're ready to get to work with me for this beautiful state we both love, then please consider chipping in $10 or more today to help us build a campaign you can be proud of -- one that will flip this Senate seat and put power back in the hands of the people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- I came to Colorado in the 1980s to work as a geologist -- but after a couple years, I was laid off. I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a big risk to open a brewpub in downtown Denver. There were plenty of days where it looked like we wouldn't make it. But what I knew then, and I still believe now, is that Colorado is a special place -- a place of opportunity and progress for everyone. It was my honor to serve the people of this great state, first as Mayor of Denver and then as Governor of Colorado. As a public servant, I learned so much about what our state has to offer and what we could accomplish together. We took on the hard fights. We beat the NRA and became the first purple state to pass universal background checks. We expanded Medicaid for over 400,000 Coloradans and got to near-universal health care coverage. **We brought people together, and we got things done. But that's the exact opposite of what 's going on in Washington today.** **So, I have to ask: if you love Colorado as much as I do and think it deserves a leader who will roll up their sleeves and get to work for everyday folks, then please chip in $10 or more now to help us flip this Senate seat.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amount=50&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200214?refcode=em-200214-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
There's a lot to love about Colorado, folks. From 300 days of sunshine a year to beautiful snowy winters, from Ute Mountain to the Sangre de Cristos to the Pawnee National Grassland, from Palisade peaches to Pueblo chiles to Olathe sweet corn, from our music to our microbreweries, there is something unique here for every Coloradan who calls our state home.
But what I love most about Colorado is the people. We're a state of hard workers who aren't afraid to fight for what's right -- and who can find common ground when it matters most.
I loved Colorado when I was a laid-off geologist. I loved Colorado more every day as a public servant. Now, as I run for Senate, I'm more excited and fired up than I've ever been to get to work for our state.
**If you 're ready to get to work with me for this beautiful state we both love, then please consider chipping in $10 or more today to help us build a campaign you can be proud of -- one that will flip this Senate seat and put power back in the hands of the people.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

John

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Early Voting Block Walk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We're less than 20 days away from the **March 3rd Primary Election** and only 4 days away from the start of Early Voting! We need to get every Republican to the polls so they can cast their ballot for Wesley.

Tomorrow, Saturday February 15th, we are hosting another block walk to help get Wesley's message out to every voter in the 7th Congressional District. President Trump and Senator Cruz agree that we need Wesley in the House. Now let's help him get there!

Please stop by one of our three block walk locations across the district and help us continue to reach every voter in the 7th District.

**Office HQ**
11511 Katy Freeway, suite 105
Houston, TX 77079
10 A.M.

**Inside the Loop**
4621 Holt Street
Bellaire, TX 77401
10 A.M.

**Jersey Village**
Starbucks at Jones Road & 290
17504 Northwest Fwy
Houston, TX 77065
10 A.M.

This is the last weekend before early voting and we need your help to get Wesley's message out to every voter in the 7th District.

If you cannot make it out this weekend, but want to volunteer another time, [please sign up here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=109077b337a14104b41b335b261827ab&_e=G4jGxJCJ7ENGrlI0G2fj4StcGk9JqYxPI-gVDJfrjQtdSlwas85PqbnTH9rfofDg4U1PdcGK8jcQslrYZgiyF_GzrdMDEmPDgebhA1-zCCqLP6O6LJVWnNPuNyn1JsZ9JvYa7myV0INJH52mWCVCEca73aV0_lKif4HXGwrNOGT08xBUOWiuoofmDzeriXCcJVK_kFxJvwDzQwJXGYnFnd0VWkBfHeiPJxiZ-8w8CTWGpt7tus3KmE098DUwd14X5JzPmt_ywvqpb5gcag9P3Q%3D%3D)

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Tina Smith
subject: I'm committed to working as hard as I can to make sure Democrats flip the Senate. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-ballot?refcode=em200214-ballot&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend,

This November, we will vote for protecting our health care, raising the minimum wage, tackling climate change, defending reproductive freedom, and many more issues that will make a meaningful difference in people's everyday lives.

Everything is on the ballot -- and all of the progress we want to see will only be possible with a Democratic majority in the Senate. Because while Republicans are figuring out how to please their wealthy donors and special-interest buddies, Democrats are busy fighting for everyday folks like you.

I'm committed to working as hard as I can to ensure our campaign is successful in November and that Democrats in tight Senate races across the country follow suit. But I need your help to build the resources it will take to win big.

**That's why I'd really appreciate it if you could make a donation of any amount toward our first mid-quarter goal of the year before tomorrow. Every dollar will help us win re-election and bring Democrats one step closer to the majority.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-ballot?refcode=em200214-ballot&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

clean_body: | "" Friend, This November, we will vote for protecting our health care, raising the minimum wage, tackling climate change, defending reproductive freedom, and many more issues that will make a meaningful difference in people's everyday lives. Everything is on the ballot -- and all of the progress we want to see will only be possible with a Democratic majority in the Senate. Because while Republicans are figuring out how to please their wealthy donors and special-interest buddies, Democrats are busy fighting for everyday folks like you. I'm committed to working as hard as I can to ensure our campaign is successful in November and that Democrats in tight Senate races across the country follow suit. But I need your help to build the resources it will take to win big. That's why I'd really appreciate it if you could make a donation of any amount toward our first mid-quarter goal of the year before tomorrow. Every dollar will help us win re-election and bring Democrats one step closer to the majority. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I couldn't do this without your support. Thanks for everything. -- Tina

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Courage

[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ceb6/30a4f917/508a52b2/28cd5274/3234372569/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200214_MQ3_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200214_MQ3_U2_X1")

| | **Serving in the military, you hear the word "courage" used a lot.** Courage is more than just putting yourself in physical danger for the good of the country. Courage is persisting in the face of oppression and discrimination. **Courage is advocating for people who have been hurt by a broken system.** Courage is standing up to people with power -- special interests, party bosses, wealthy donors -- to fight for working people who need help the most. **Courage is sacrificing personal profit and your own ambitions to keep your campaign promises.** Courage is standing up for what's right even when it's not easy -- **and my Republican opponent has a long track record of making easy decisions instead of courageous ones.** [**That 's why I need your help to unseat him in 2020 -- we're $6,752 short of our mid-quarter goal. In Chabots' decades-long tenure in Congress, **he 's almost never faced consequences for his lack of courage.**
He's sided with his pharmaceutical company donors and voted against lowering the cost of life-saving medication.
He's sided with the NRA and voted against requiring background checks for all gun purchases -- **he 'd rather have the thousands they donate to his campaign than to do his part to make sure our kids are safe.**
He's even faced multiple complaints from the FEC over inconsistencies on his financial reports -- **including most recently when more than a hundred thousand dollars went missing from his campaign committee.**
[**It 's about time Chabot learns that we don't reward cowards -- will you help my campaign hit our mid-quarter goal so we can beat Chabot?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200214_MQ3_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Itrsquos+about+time+Chabot+learns+that+w&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200214_MQ3_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200214_MQ3_U2_X1")

name: Senate Battleground 2020 (via Voter Protection Project)
subject: Break up with Mitch McConnell 💔
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Sorry, Mitch. It's over.- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - **Sorry, Mitch McConnell, but this relationship isn't working for us -- and neither are you!** [**Every dollar raised into our NEW Senate Battleground Fund will help America BREAK UP with Senate Republicans in November. Can you chip in $5 or any amount today?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d058a/72412298/4ec25b11/61046ed1/4195479001/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIxNF9WRGF5X1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Every+dollar+raised+into+our+NEW+Senate+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1") **[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d058a/72412298/4ec25b11/61046ed0/4195479001/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIxNF9WRGF5X1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1")** **THE SENATE IS RED...** There are 23 Republican senators on the ballot this November. **LET'S TURN IT BLUE...** We need to gain just FOUR seats to flip the Senate blue. **VICTORY WILL BE SWEET...** We will FINALLY pass the more than 200 bills Mitch McConnell is blocking, including universal background checks. **... ALL WE NEED IS YOU!** Wealthy right-wing donors are going ALL-IN to help the Mitch hold onto power -- we need our grassroots team to step up! **[Since we launched our new Senate Battleground Fund, this incredible team has chipped in 1,802 donations! Can we close out Valentine's Day with 2,000 contributions to break up with Trump, Mitch, and the GOP in November?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d058a/72412298/4ec25b11/61046ed3/4195479001/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIxNF9WRGF5X1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Since+we+launched+our+new+Senate+Battleg&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1")** | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d058a/72412298/4ec25b11/61046ed2/4195479001/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfZmxpcHRoZXNlbmF0ZV9mZWIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDIxNF9WRGF5X1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_flipthesenate_feb?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200214_VDay_U1_X1")

---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4gkL9xReE-f3wcoG4jWBEinoPL8j7LFF4tkjvOsi-YIT4OTv8omzkSQDiIlmgpRp9OnKgdsxyF_b-YxMds7SMD-kiQkfLpGWS_dOFidpAVekqA-4JdIOSw9cHS3PHxzO9vHhjorUtMkk0Fo4BEpjsP_xOszrK7ib3jS7U-R0pUXfKOXsWbKMCnefu-Gox9k&c=aCRYlFBX0BgSPscUL_44093PPrusBZkX5vchCgNJOnpH-YzWY1HfoA==&ch=6D5GgioEgK7NNL0OdLqvkiQyX8Ebs3cWkk5QiBmZcXJ528F7DC4Abg==)

| Peter,
Early voting is just a couple days away, and our campaign is busy crisscrossing the district meeting as many voters as possible. Check out what we've been up to over the last week!
---
| IN THE DISTRICT
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4gkL9xReE-f3wcoG4jWBEinoPL8j7LFF4tkjvOsi-YIT4OTv8omziirXQ5Vbgu17j2Sz1nYJVMh5qPm2tUggSw3IjiN_C31NarDAXeT9Pg_y_oifRwnJmCml9O_SX5o_A10-6RxKMoMQyIwWNUI44SYyJYVhuizI5CvuZrJnZ3mFrwr1qNtjr0lNJNfYXNoDGzrre4N57xcQs547i9r4w==&c=aCRYlFBX0BgSPscUL_44093PPrusBZkX5vchCgNJOnpH-YzWY1HfoA==&ch=6D5GgioEgK7NNL0OdLqvkiQyX8Ebs3cWkk5QiBmZcXJ528F7DC4Abg==)

| NEW TV AD!
---
| We also launched our new TV ad, "Texas Woman" this week. If you haven't yet seen it on TV or online, click below to watch.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4gkL9xReE-f3wcoG4jWBEinoPL8j7LFF4tkjvOsi-YIT4OTv8omziVQ6T-wd8157XNTnsK9o7ZX0-_QLrsTBbzK02S0gq7Lf1Q7f8H3ZVp3NKrEavMwXsIbLE96gtu-G39Ehk8olghyxtDl8AsTmg==&c=aCRYlFBX0BgSPscUL_44093PPrusBZkX5vchCgNJOnpH-YzWY1HfoA==&ch=6D5GgioEgK7NNL0OdLqvkiQyX8Ebs3cWkk5QiBmZcXJ528F7DC4Abg==)

| MORE ENDORSEMENTS
---
| More and more endorsements keep coming in from current and former elected officials, as well as prominent conservative organizations. Here are some of the endorsements we received this week.

---
| VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITY
---
| Finally, we have several volunteer opportunities coming up, including block walking tomorrow morning. These events are critical to our victory, so we need all the volunteers we can get. Click/tap below to get more info and RSVP to our Facebook events. I hope we'll see you there!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v4gkL9xReE-f3wcoG4jWBEinoPL8j7LFF4tkjvOsi-YIT4OTv8omziirXQ5Vbgu1Y8kTNZYI84L94OM10nmh2yUo8g96pZtEoQjzWLbwEXssbnFJ3U38XzMEKlDK8LAWEQbu7A3LWZPKK2C6_Oi_HaNXP05GtT1-e0iABt3mrzQwdw1yVXWK7g==&c=aCRYlFBX0BgSPscUL_44093PPrusBZkX5vchCgNJOnpH-YzWY1HfoA==&ch=6D5GgioEgK7NNL0OdLqvkiQyX8Ebs3cWkk5QiBmZcXJ528F7DC4Abg==)
---
| Now that our campaign has entered the final weeks, we're busier than ever and there's so much to update you all on! I hope I'll see you over the next few weeks at our volunteer opportunities or at district events.
---
|
---
| Genevieve

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Huge: More ‘Better Off' Under Trump than Clinton, Bush, and Obama | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8849066b3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Huge: More ‘Better Off' Under Trump than Clinton, Bush, and Obama**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef042e9c46&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
A record 61% of Americans say they are better off now than they were before President Trump took office 3 years ago, according to a new Gallup poll. “What’s more, people give Trump much more credit for the improved economy than former President Barack Obama, [whose] supporters have been claiming credit,” Paul Bedard reports.

**NEW:**[**“** Small-business owners more optimistic at the start of 2020”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf8898da4b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The Trump Administration’s Coronavirus Response Is Protecting Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3b5dd8d93a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“The first duty of the federal government is to keep our citizens safe. Since the United States first became aware on Dec. 30 of what has become known as the novel coronavirus, America’s public health officials have closely monitored the situation, worked to understand the virus and taken steps to limit Americans’ exposure to it,” Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and HHS Secretary Alex Azar write.
---
|
---
| [**President Trump Keeps Promises to the 'Forgotten Americans'**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abc4028746&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“In his 2016 victory speech, Donald Trump talked about ‘the forgotten men and women of our country,’ declaring that they ‘will be forgotten no longer.’ Today, after months of impeachment proceedings, accusations of wrongdoing and a media that has reported overwhelmingly negative stories about him for three years, his polling numbers are at their highest ever,” Heritage Foundation President Kay Coles James writes.

** WATCH:** [From day 1, their goal was to silence your voice. But they couldn't.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6d88e1346&e=3ee4985eea)

-_The Associated Press_
“Two senators — one Republican and one Democrat — are leading a legislative effort to have a global women’s initiative spearheaded by President Donald Trump’s daughter Ivanka written into law . . . [The bill] would make the economic empowerment of women a priority of U.S. foreign policy,” Darlene Superville reports.

_-The Washington Post_
“President Trump is exceptionally focused on fighting for Americans who can’t fight for themselves and confronting problems other administrations, Democratic and Republican, have ignored. This is particularly true for Americans who suffer from addiction and serious mental disorders,” White House Domestic Policy Council Director Joe Grogan writes. Nearly 50 million Americans experienced mental illness in 2018. The President’s new budget proposes the boldest reforms in decades to help them.

body:
I wanted you to be among the first to know, my friend Bill Bachenberg has endorsed my candidacy for Congress! Bill is a national board member of the N Peter, I wanted you to be among the first to know, my friend Bill Bachenberg has endorsed my candidacy for Congress! Bill is a national board member of the National Rifle Association and a fellow advocate for the Second Amendment. Bill knows that I will be a strong defender of the Second Amendment and that I will never let gun grabbers in Washington encroach on our gun rights. Our Second Amendment rights are something we must preserve and protect and I will never allow them to be infringed upon. I admire Bill's dedication to preserving our rights by serving on the Board of the NRA and he work founding the National Disability Awareness Shoot that supports those with disabilities, including, our nation's wounded warriors. Please join Bill and help our campaign grow! [Tell me about all the issues that are important to you by clicking here.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=65e9710e5e444eec9ee43e5737651a95&_e=T7fP0ybDK9lzzr8LkI_-bVJ4nezRhYzfqNLgfJBO4TWk6YDRHO0z-X6hAVCzq_Nxd2stccWLVShn0PVncJ_uHCNQDENE57jKYUUJ2zoDSQIIHwDpClMMnISjyo9k1aLb16FXKIwT0iYBRJXkr5bwp6-hWvElV4IoQhilHi88j-lST4prgCYRUV5Y021pXqOxRh_qNhmF9poFwo0BN6Am5N3oQ4qtjuK5XuWEhvLbs0PkLO--GNrbHgaq7Y7Jw3PJ-4nzOJo8Tz9kI0bPaR14NrLo6qoXuY1tpj9fTURn2sOE0obp8ZhEhLHRFdusHCU4XCT16GJbAIT5G929zh_zxQk2h2e2eyGLKmZwDFlX16-6-exqoIrDXJO6sqyO33dvRImj8HEh6E00VTNbdSq1MRbFJ3mutOCkqglU2bEf_okd6K_PrQ6liawwx1PeVAe6) Sincerely, Lisa Scheller Candidate for Congress (PA-07) PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=65e9710e5e444eec9ee43e5737651a95&_t=3E3-T3IDmwTOs6K6aaYNyBSpd-jZ2YZaFHOUgDNnpP-QDR1gv37YbALwjY1QB-c7atdMaAC-fuTI9n3Ra2FXlH3OcegloACfBjMBL4je2Wl1c3cbJr5rM4sjmS0QSCJ3bPfCwE6oJVmxuQLq2zQ8Iwk-CTCeZjy5d8GvGSLHlmw%3D)

Oregonians have been in a long term, long-distance relationship with our Congressman and after 33 years, the thrill is gone. The planet is warming, the homeless are freezing, the tuition keeps rising, and that attacks on immigrants keep escalating. We deserve better than this. We're ready to see other people...and we've got someone in mind!
[Donate $10, $20, $100 or whatever you can afford to send Doyle Canning to Congress in 2020. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/5wA/ni0YAA/t.2z9/kewQJO5lSmy0ZOBXTPSdnw/h8/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0-2Bh9EaXVzrmgR-2F6nMV7AmM6JPmzbyJhkQnXl6G93tIDKGn-2BSqOnqho05bWr9qo3Xi2gYUsEHQDMr6gm-2FgUhxRaKDbX3YjAro0C-2BOXK21NCRGWYqoy6TEXrrq-2Fi6LpOnBV-2Bps-2FxLg6VKEGJHj-2F-2FQBWkJw1OVcPagU2SMgJ5rm06U8z-2BaBPl6sznCSwsNXm5XBJFvfzqBmQftkUYfn181tn4GoMEkednqU-2B3mxzHXevbglpsGE8q2OB3fmMjQ-2FfPkjk/GUOd) Love, Team Canning for Congress

clean_body: | | Hi Friend, This campaign is all about love. Love for the people, and the planet, is what drives us every day to elect Doyle Canning to the US Congress. She is the real deal -- a leader with the heart, grit, and vision to build a brave movement for fundamental change. Doyle is our True Blue. While the incumbent cozies up to corporate donors and sides with Republicans in Congress, Doyle is building a movement powered by people like you. | Oregonians have been in a long term, long-distance relationship with our Congressman and after 33 years, the thrill is gone. The planet is warming, the homeless are freezing, the tuition keeps rising, and that attacks on immigrants keep escalating. We deserve better than this. We're ready to see other people...and we've got someone in mind! Love, Team Canning for Congress | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: More than thoughts and prayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
We have to do more to prevent gun violence. I’m ready.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=0a1a8d95e0044838bce9431c36823258&_e=0R0ghTR0BIOKNTOMhMOd-jmoERIaLtFoF4d9cXpmptH9VfeEZ6RjvRHnJ0RNl7tyLkairq7eJwpU2sDvQXuOQ82IjxGZ_YTTwthA6a8pbefC_TO_7BhEOcz2Kyc9txQOW59S05vjL0dHV7HT3vpLmPfPtQZXJJyC9ck2Yt2XAu07ahREAs2LzSo3lXrF-i3zCqN_mxDoFBLXLkaw2W-r3SU6oBGk5KCaP9bWNRemwKjORIYYBTeOlTpsAk0Xonx_i0Zo69OEQPNmIgC7A9hoDlFCOGNmAzmn9fanXsm3d1mBZ7qAtjt8ivDji9QGS-wbeXVyHUnYrvB4fn4witq_hg%3D%3D)
We have to do more than offer thoughts and prayers.

We have to take action -- for the survivors and families who grieve every day for their loved ones, but especially today. On Valentine’s Day two years ago, a gunman opened fire at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, killing 17 people and injuring 17 others.

Donald Trump has done nothing to prevent more lives from being lost to gun violence.

But activists across the country have stood up to say enough is enough. People of all ages have gotten organized and cast votes to end the gridlock on gun safety in Washington. Parkland survivors are helping to lead a movement of young people demanding change. [**Today, I want you to hear from some of the brave survivors I’ve met, and commit to the fight to do more. Watch their stories now.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=0a1a8d95e0044838bce9431c36823258&_e=0R0ghTR0BIOKNTOMhMOd-jmoERIaLtFoF4d9cXpmptH9VfeEZ6RjvRHnJ0RNl7tyLkairq7eJwpU2sDvQXuOQ82IjxGZ_YTTwthA6a8pbefb_yxvjswkdG8VgC1iAiaWMlAnyUZlBDludDk_0O7HBhHA6Lwee17NGzCiMwik8Je0yGzgNllWZfisB8TzpRQRD-XWgwoNMQ6LMyQiSgtcx-kQQEGx6R7YtgqlMeHvpZcEdF_-TOyA2tjuosTe1j-FYth8iDJp3WqpshYNy0QsQjTUoPCtny2bpogsxNZVl2fwgmi-GKCHD2O2kji_L9ODBtnTO_TTs4jiHfZ8AcS7bw%3D%3D) [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=0a1a8d95e0044838bce9431c36823258&_e=0R0ghTR0BIOKNTOMhMOd-jmoERIaLtFoF4d9cXpmptFEVYAc-U_VNr9gR-gb9sJ0ncCAH1MqZ5ehJ-kuxyZrgBpRwfqtiLecSmFWIdy6ri1-ngGYi6pd-HFB6sJMCBPlKOi9iqqyCsSTtvxOjvglWzFtWctv0srnxrielfvPhmXKrhouLFag0miz3gvy4wa1gj_A7JVbG7hSXWvxv6MGuoE5zehJGZ206mf3tthnbgREtmWjjgxZ-RJWZ-499CEOcpIAIbpnF8ZO0n4yZ7pzaZtzDtcpea8AELo1uNSQjZ-zsZD5fRikZwRgH1gvbCOrEZkXRFi5G738jPH_CHdt8E7LCSmen5T34qWN-T8fAvo%3D) I got in the fight to prevent gun violence long before Parkland -- and I’m still in it now. I promise when I’m in the White House to sign comprehensive gun safety legislation and make our country safer for everyone. Thank you for being part of this movement, Mike Bloomberg | **[Watch »](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=0a1a8d95e0044838bce9431c36823258&_e=0R0ghTR0BIOKNTOMhMOd-jmoERIaLtFoF4d9cXpmptH9VfeEZ6RjvRHnJ0RNl7tyLkairq7eJwpU2sDvQXuOQ82IjxGZ_YTTwthA6a8pbedSnlb0P7cep32c0doVSL2CEAfYnn5mvffs2JI-MZ0NYK6aPBg3BUdIZ9L2ZKi82UBYze3jybhaXDaX_gCJzjXZ2-vm4ULS182ms3nBZKk1i-WXNBFzc45B1i7o4p-NTcAmLXzh2xSJUU52TPJjN1GcQIFhUJJ73mRDtckOT1sklaA6Ff2wcXEihYf9ev_vuqbwvkUyLnx5lVozJHEBZli2mztoC8EunxfG_ooDIXTU-A%3D%3D) **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Builders Love Gov. Holcomb
body:
After this week, in the face of Nancy Pelosi's attempt to shred our country's progress, President Trump is winning -- and so is America. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/president-trump-keeps-winning-469029?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Builders Love Governor Holcomb!_** It's Valentine's Day, and there's no doubt that love (and a whole lot of support in this election) is in the air this week. That's because the Indiana Builders Association \-- an organization made up of builders, remodelers, developers and subcontractors in the residential and light construction industries -- endorsed **Governor Holcomb** for reelection!

And this isn't just any endorsement. This is the Indiana Builders Association's first ever endorsement! In their 68 years as an organization, the group has never before come out in support of a gubernatorial candidate. But when it comes to **Governor Holcomb** , they see a leader who is bringing jobs to our state and _building_ an even better place to live and work.

The Indiana Builders Association is joining the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Chamber of Commerce with this endorsement. The Indiana Builders Association is 2,700 members strong, with members employing 350,000 Hoosiers. And they're focused on Putting People First in every community in our state...just like Governor Holcomb, which is why he's thankful to have their support.

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

**PHOTO:_Governor Holcomb_** _joins Indiana Builders Association President Brett Harter, CEO Rick Wajda and members across the state as the organization formally endorses Governor Holcomb for reelection this year!_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Helping Hoosier Educators & Students Succeed_** This week, **Governor Holcomb **listened to teachers and signed legislation that will ensure Indiana’s students, teachers and schools will have time to successfully adjust to the new ILEARN. Holding schools harmless allows educators to remain focused on helping Hoosier students succeed and delivering a quality education.

Holding schools harmless during this transition period is a key part of **Governor Holcomb’s** 2020 Next Level Agenda. **Governor Holcomb** is continuing to deliver results for all Hoosiers and is working hard to continue Putting People First!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Joins Indiana Latino Legislative Breakfast**_
On Tuesday, **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** joined the Indiana Latino Institute for the group's annual legislative breakfast. At the event, he highlighted **Governor Holcomb's** record of success and the importance of Indiana Republicans continuing to broaden our outreach to more Hoosiers from minority communities.

Here's an excerpt from his speech:

_“As I said at our state convention a couple years ago, we have got to make a more concerted effort to grow diversity and inclusion within our ranks. Our policies are great and right, but communities of color need to not only see and know someone that looks like them in our party, but also know that we’re a big tent and we welcome new ideas and fresh debate around important issues. We don’t have to agree all the time... that’s part of what makes us strong and differentiates us from the other side. We want—we need—people who bring different things to the table but share common values. Values like caring for our most vulnerable... the value of hard work, knowing that hard, honest work is the best way to improve your life and the lives of your family. We believe that good policy happens when we listen—not talk at—people and communities. Both the Governor and I are committed to this.” _
---

clean_body: After this week, in the face of Nancy Pelosi's attempt to shred our country's progress, President Trump is winning -- and so is America. | | | | | | | Builders Love Governor Holcomb! It's Valentine's Day, and there's no doubt that love (and a whole lot of support in this election) is in the air this week. That's because the Indiana Builders Association \-- an organization made up of builders, remodelers, developers and subcontractors in the residential and light construction industries -- endorsed Governor Holcomb for reelection! And this isn't just any endorsement. This is the Indiana Builders Association's first ever endorsement! In their 68 years as an organization, the group has never before come out in support of a gubernatorial candidate. But when it comes to Governor Holcomb , they see a leader who is bringing jobs to our state and building an even better place to live and work. The Indiana Builders Association is joining the Indiana State Police Alliance and the Indiana Chamber of Commerce with this endorsement. The Indiana Builders Association is 2,700 members strong, with members employing 350,000 Hoosiers. And they're focused on Putting People First in every community in our state...just like Governor Holcomb, which is why he's thankful to have their support. -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO:Governor Holcomb joins Indiana Builders Association President Brett Harter, CEO Rick Wajda and members across the state as the organization formally endorses Governor Holcomb for reelection this year! | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Helping Hoosier Educators & Students Succeed This week, Governor Holcomb listened to teachers and signed legislation that will ensure Indiana’s students, teachers and schools will have time to successfully adjust to the new ILEARN. Holding schools harmless allows educators to remain focused on helping Hoosier students succeed and delivering a quality education. Holding schools harmless during this transition period is a key part of Governor Holcomb’s 2020 Next Level Agenda. Governor Holcomb is continuing to deliver results for all Hoosiers and is working hard to continue Putting People First! | | | Chairman Hupfer Joins Indiana Latino Legislative Breakfast On Tuesday, Chairman Kyle Hupfer joined the Indiana Latino Institute for the group's annual legislative breakfast. At the event, he highlighted Governor Holcomb's record of success and the importance of Indiana Republicans continuing to broaden our outreach to more Hoosiers from minority communities. Here's an excerpt from his speech: “As I said at our state convention a couple years ago, we have got to make a more concerted effort to grow diversity and inclusion within our ranks. Our policies are great and right, but communities of color need to not only see and know someone that looks like them in our party, but also know that we’re a big tent and we welcome new ideas and fresh debate around important issues. We don’t have to agree all the time... that’s part of what makes us strong and differentiates us from the other side. We want—we need—people who bring different things to the table but share common values. Values like caring for our most vulnerable... the value of hard work, knowing that hard, honest work is the best way to improve your life and the lives of your family. We believe that good policy happens when we listen—not talk at—people and communities. Both the Governor and I are committed to this.” | | | Join Us at the 2020 Republican State Convention! The Indiana Republican State Convention will be June 19-20 in Indianapolis. We've updated with information you'll need about state convention, so if you're planning to attend, make sure to check it out. This includes: Delegate Fees: If you're in a non-contested race for a delegate spot to this year's convention or if your county chair appoints you to an open delegate spot, you can now pay your delegate fees . Hotel Room Block: The room block for two downtown hotels is now open! If you plan to stay overnight in Indianapolis, reserve your room now! More info is available . | | | Meet Senator Braun in South Bend! Next Wednesday, the St. Joseph County Republican Party is hosting a meet and greet with Senator Mike Braun. All Republicans are welcome! If you plan to attend, get more information and RSVP ! | | | Upcoming Republican Events : Perry Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Holcomb : Adams County GOP Breakfast : Washington Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Chairman Kyle Hupfer : Dubois County Lincoln Day Dinner : Lake County Lincoln Day Dinner with Senator Todd Young : Washington Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Chairman Kyle Hupfer : Johnson County Lincoln Day Dinner with Gary Varvel : Vanderburgh County Lincoln Day Dinner with Governor Holcomb : Pike Township Lincoln Day Dinner with Chairman Kyle Hupfer : Miami County Lincoln Day Dinner with Lt. body:
CNBC reported that Biden's 280 guests at a pair of closed-door fundraisers will include "some of the biggest names in the financial services community" -- from places like Goldman Sachs, Citigroup... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852af2e/45c30650/1fe4252c3/66e501f8/3995206470/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
What do you call a gathering of over one hundred Wall Street big shots and wealthy donors at a restaurant in Manhattan?

A Joe Biden fundraiser. And he hosted two of them just last night.

CNBC reported that Biden's 280 guests at a pair of closed-door fundraisers included "some of the biggest names in the financial services community" -- from places like Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, and Morgan Stanley.

He's expected to have raised at least $1 million in just one night. That will pay for a lot of campaigning in critical Super Tuesday states.

**Elizabeth's time is not for sale, and when she's president, our government won't be for sale, either.** Instead of catering to Wall Street, she'll keep doing what she's been doing for decades: fighting for working people.

**And instead of scooping up $1 million in one night by cozying up to the wealthy and well-connected, Elizabeth is only counting on grassroots donors like you.** A couple hundred rich donors shouldn't be able to decide the Democratic nominee for president. And if we all stay in this fight, they won't be able to.

**[We need to hit our $7 million goal so we can stay competitive through Super Tuesday-- can you chip in $2 or whatever you can right now to help elect Wall Street's last choice for president, Elizabeth Warren?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852af2e/45c30650/1fe4252c3/66e501fb/3995206470/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzg0Rl9FR0xfTkZGX0NfMjAyMDAyMTRfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO84F_EGL_NFF_C_20200214_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

A couple hundred rich donors shouldn't be able to decide the Democratic nominee for president. And if we all stay in this fight, they won't be able to. name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: I'm asking for you to help my brother flip Texas Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
Friend, My twin brother Joaquin is working his heart out to make sure Texas flips Blue this November. We can do it - but he needs your help | | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, This November we have the opportunity to do something that even just five years ago would have seemed impossible. **[Flip Texas BLUE>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc928/3eb3e2fc/6a2a7275/744eaea7/1737636751/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://go.joaquincastro.com/page/m/-%3D/?g=MC2jCjpTVzRcmxCHNtanPcA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Flip+Texas+BLUE+gtgt&utm_campaign=20200214EM&source=20200214EM")** In 2018, Democrats won 47% of the vote in Congressional elections in Texas. For the first time in 25 years, we fielded candidates in every congressional district in the state. We invested in the lonestar state, and we saw the reward. This time around we can finish the job. But it's not going to be easy. Democrats like my brother Congressman Joaquin Castro need your help to build the infrastructure to win back our state in November. They need to hire staff to knock on doors, phonebank, and reach out to voters who have been ignored by our political leaders for decades. **[We can't do it without you >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc928/3eb3e2fc/6a2a7275/744eaea6/1737636751/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://go.joaquincastro.com/page/m/-%3D/?g=MC2jCjpTVzRcmxCHNtanPcA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+We+canrsquot+do+it+without+you+gtgt&utm_campaign=20200214EM&source=20200214EM")** My brother has set an ambitious goal to raise $5766 in the next 24 hours so that he can begin making investments to help turn Texas Blue. **[Can you chip in just $25 today to help us get the resources to flip Texas Blue>>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc928/3eb3e2fc/6a2a7275/744eaea5/1737636751/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://go.joaquincastro.com/page/m/-%3D/?g=MC2jCjpTVzRcmxCHNtanPcA&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Can+you+chip+in+just+25+today+to+help+us&utm_campaign=20200214EM&source=20200214EM")** Let's go win, Julian

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Brrr...It's Cold Outside
body:
Oh, and Happy Valentine's Day! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aeb5fda689fc/brrrits-cold-outside?e=c56804a14d)
---
| | |
---
|
# Happy Valentine's Day!
It may be cold outside, but the campaign is fired up!
Today we will be visiting veterans and homeless individuals to hand out some Valentine's day love, but we want to make sure all of you get some, too. Thank you for joining this campaign and helping us reach out to individuals that are too often ignored by our political system.

We're reaching several important dates in our campaign, and we want all of you to be involved where you can. First, on Wednesday, February 19, we will have our first CD6 DFL Candidate Debate in the Monticello Community Center at 6:30 pm. Please come out to support Ian as he passionately presents the people centered platform we've been running on for years.

Tuesday, February 25, is caucus night! We hope you're planning to attend, and we hope you'll consider becoming a delegate so you can support Ian at the CD6 convention. If you aren't sure where your caucus location is, use [https://caucusfinder.sos.state.mn.us/](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=e984e23f97&e=c56804a14d)

Finally, if you haven't taken advantage of early voting for the presidential primary, Tuesday, March 3rd, is Minnesota's primary night. This is the first year we'll be voting for the presidential nominee outside of the caucus. Now we're part of perhaps the most consequential night of the primary season: Super Tuesday.

We hope to see you soon at the debate and the conventions, but if you can't make it, feel free to reach out to us so we can help you plan a phone banking session, door knock, house party, or community event!
---

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Republicans are afraid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390320/55b66746/22e5daa2/80fe17e/2828076968/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Two years ago today, our nation's heart broke - yet again - as we watched students flee Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. **Before that tragic day was over, Congressional Republicans were urging our nation to do _nothing_ in response, and vowing to lead the effort to get _nothing_ done.** They've kept their promise. In the two years since that day in Parkland, Florida, Republicans in the Senate have done nothing to make our schools and communities safer. **No vote. No action. No debate._Nothing._** The NRA has Mitch McConnell and his followers in the palm of their hands. So much so that they are not just afraid to solve the problem, they're afraid to talk about solving the problem. And so, they do _nothing._ **Today, we reject _nothing. _And we stand with those who have done something. ** We stand with the Parkland students who marched for their lives. We stand with Moms Demand Action who fight not just for their kids but for every kid. We stand with the communities whose gun epidemics don't make headlines, who face daily violence on their streets and in their schools. We stand with every single family who has lost a loved one to gun violence in this country. It's past time we ban assault weapons. Enact red flag laws. Conduct gun violence prevention research. Invest in suicide prevention and mental health. And hold gun manufacturers accountable for the hell they cause. No more nothing. We need action. \- Joe If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390320/55b66746/22e5daa2/80fe17f/2828076968/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-02-14-parkland&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390320/55b66746/22e5daa2/80fe178/2828076968/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-02-14-parkland&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390320/55b66746/22e5daa2/80fe179/2828076968/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-14-parkland&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390320/55b66746/22e5daa2/80fe17a/2828076968/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-14-parkland&refcode2=express-buttons")
