name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Why I'm endorsing Jessica Cisneros
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
body:
We would be lucky to have her represent San Antonio and the rest of South Texas.
#

Peter -
I was born and raised in San Antonio. It's where I served on the city council and as mayor. It's where I returned after serving in the Obama administration. And It's where I'm proud to call home.
I know this community, and I know that it deserves leaders who will fight for our shared values.
That's why I'm proud to endorse Jessica Cisneros for Congress today. We would be lucky to have her represent San Antonio and the rest of South Texas, but she needs our help to win this race.
[**Can you make a $3 donation to her campaign today? Her election is just a couple weeks away, and outside special interests are dumping massive amounts of money into the district to try to stop her.**](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57fcb/29362a23/25e5356b/57bf02ec/1400066957/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-castro?refcode=em200214-full")
Jessica shares our progressive values and will fight for the most vulnerable members of our community -- standing up for immigrants, working people and the poor.
She will help us build an America where everyone is seen and heard.
For too long, we've watched as elected officials bend to corporate interests or side with Donald Trump's cruel and inhumane border policies, enough is enough.
We need new leadership -- a leader who will stand up to Donald Trump on behalf of our communities.
Jessica Cisneros will. She's the daughter of Mexican immigrants and a human rights lawyer. She understands the challenges the people of Texas and this country are facing because she's lived them herself.
I know she will make us proud in Congress. So I'm asking you to help her get across the finish line before her primary on March 3:
[**Jessica 's campaign is powered by people like you. Please make a $3 donation today to help her fight back against the corporate special interests who want to stop our progressive movement.**](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57fcb/29362a23/25e5356b/57bf02ec/1400066957/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-castro?refcode=em200214-full")
Thank you for joining Jessica in this fight. I cannot wait to call her our congresswoman.
Together, we will win!
For the Future,
Secretary Julian Castro
**[DONATE](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57fcb/29362a23/25e5356b/57bf02ec/1400066957/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMTQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-castro?refcode=em200214-full")**

* * *
Paid for by Jessica Cisneros for Congress
---

7305 San Dario Ave, Suite G
Box # 317
Laredo, TX 78045 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57fcb/29362a23/25e5356b/57bf02ed/1400066957/VEsC/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "http://cisneros.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Jessica Cisneros with a contribution, click [here](https://act.jessicacisnerosforcongress.com/page/m/78e57fcb/29362a23/25e5356b/57bf02f2/1400066957/VEsD/?g=TMk7Ejjfd5ld6LIGuiySe2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cisneros-december?refcode=em_footer").

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Wow! FWD: 💙 Skip the chocolates. Flip the Senate. 💙
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | | I knew our team was committed to flipping the Senate but I am just consistently blown away by folks who show up to get it done. **Team Merkley has already helped raise more than $6,000 today** for Mark Kelly, Theresa Greenfield, Sara Gideon, and Jaime Harrison! That's amazing! **[Let's get that up to $12,000 to flip these states from red to blue! clean_body: | | | I knew our team was committed to flipping the Senate but I am just consistently blown away by folks who show up to get it done. Team Merkley has already helped raise more than $6,000 today for Mark Kelly, Theresa Greenfield, Sara Gideon, and Jaime Harrison! That's amazing! "" Remember: 100% of your contribution goes to these four Democratic champions! Thank you from the bottom of my heart this Valentine's Day. Jeff Forwarded Message "" This Valentine's Day, I want to spread the love and support some of the incredible candidates fighting to flip the Senate blue this year. "" "" "" We only need to flip FOUR SEATS to win a majority. So let's skip the flowers and candy--instead, send these candidates the resources they need to help us win a Democratic Senate in November. "" "" "" Want to help out even more? After making your donation, will you forward this email to at least 3 more people? We want to get Theresa, Mark, Jaime, and Sara as much support as we can heading into 2020. There's so much at stake--we have to do more than just wear our hearts on our sleeves. We have to pick challengers in races all across the country and we have to give them everything we've got until they cross the finish line. "" Happy Valentine's Day! Jeff "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""
